57	router.get('/', async (req, res) => {
58	  try {
59	    const { 
60	      page = 1, 
61	      limit = 50, 
62	      search = '', 
63	      invoiceNumbers, // Comma-separated invoice numbers for exact match
64	      companyId, 
65	      companyIds, // Support multiple company IDs (comma-separated or array)
66	      status, 
67	      startDate, 
68	      endDate,
69	      sortBy = 'issueDate',
70	      sortOrder = 'DESC',
71	      retentionFilter // 'expiring_soonest' or null
72	    } = req.query;
73	    const pageNum = parseInt(page);
74	    const limitNum = parseInt(limit);
75	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * limitNum;
76	    
77	    const whereConditions = buildCompanyFilter(req.accessibleCompanyIds);
78	    
79	    // Debug logging for Global Admins
80	    if (req.user.role === 'global_admin') {
81	      console.log(`🔍 [Invoices GET] Global Admin access - accessibleCompanyIds: ${req.accessibleCompanyIds === null ? 'null (all companies)' : JSON.stringify(req.accessibleCompanyIds)}, whereConditions: ${JSON.stringify(whereConditions)}`);
82	    }
83	    
84	    // Company filter - support both single and multiple IDs
85	    // IMPORTANT: Expand parent company IDs to include all descendants (branches)
86	    if (companyIds) {
87	      // Handle comma-separated string or array
88	      const ids = Array.isArray(companyIds) ? companyIds : companyIds.split(',').map(id => id.trim()).filter(id => id);
89	      if (ids.length > 0) {
90	        // Expand each company ID to include its descendants (for parent companies)
91	        const expandedIds = new Set();
92	        for (const id of ids) {
93	          expandedIds.add(id);
94	          const descendants = await getDescendantCompanyIds(id, false);
95	          descendants.forEach(d => expandedIds.add(d));
96	        }
97	        whereConditions.companyId = { [Op.in]: Array.from(expandedIds) };
98	      }
99	    } else if (companyId) {
100	      // Single company ID - also expand to include descendants
101	      const expandedIds = new Set([companyId]);
102	      const descendants = await getDescendantCompanyIds(companyId, false);
103	      descendants.forEach(d => expandedIds.add(d));
104	      whereConditions.companyId = { [Op.in]: Array.from(expandedIds) };
105	    }
106	    
107	    if (startDate || endDate) {
108	      whereConditions.issueDate = {};
109	      if (startDate) {
110	        whereConditions.issueDate[Op.gte] = new Date(startDate);
111	      }
112	      if (endDate) {
113	        whereConditions.issueDate[Op.lte] = new Date(endDate);
114	      }
115	    }
116	    
117	    // Build search conditions
118	    const searchConditions = [];
119	    
120	    // Handle comma-separated invoice numbers (exact match) - takes priority over regular search
121	    if (invoiceNumbers) {
122	      const numbers = invoiceNumbers.split(',').map(n => n.trim()).filter(n => n);
123	      console.log('🔍 [Invoices] Searching for invoice numbers:', numbers);
124	      if (numbers.length > 0) {
125	        // Use case-insensitive matching - search for any of the invoice numbers
126	        searchConditions.push(...numbers.map(num => ({
127	          invoiceNumber: { [Op.iLike]: num }
128	        })));
129	      }
130	    }
131	    // Otherwise use regular search (partial match)
132	    else if (search) {
133	      const searchTerm = `%${search}%`;
134	      searchConditions.push(
135	        { invoiceNumber: { [Op.iLike]: searchTerm } },
136	        { notes: { [Op.iLike]: searchTerm } },
137	        // Search in metadata.parsedData fields (invoiceTo, deliveryAddress, customerPO, etc.)
138	        sequelize.where(
139	          sequelize.cast(sequelize.col('Invoice.metadata'), 'text'),
140	          { [Op.iLike]: searchTerm }
141	        )
142	      );
143	      
144	      // Add company search via subquery
145	      // Use Sequelize's escape method which returns a properly escaped string
146	      const escapedSearchTerm = sequelize.escape(searchTerm);
147	      const companySearchSubquery = sequelize.literal(`EXISTS (
148	        SELECT 1 FROM "companies" 
149	        WHERE "companies"."id" = "Invoice"."companyId"
150	        AND (
151	          "companies"."name" ILIKE ${escapedSearchTerm} OR
152	          CAST("companies"."referenceNo" AS TEXT) ILIKE ${escapedSearchTerm} OR
153	          "companies"."code" ILIKE ${escapedSearchTerm}
154	        )
155	      )`);
156	      searchConditions.push(companySearchSubquery);
157	    }
158	    
159	    // Document status filter (ready_new, viewed, downloaded, queried, review)
160	    const statusConditions = [];
161	    if (status) {
162	      if (status === 'ready_new') {
163	        // Ready (New) = documentStatus is 'ready' and not viewed
164	        statusConditions.push({
165	          documentStatus: 'ready',
166	          viewedAt: null
167	        });
168	      } else if (status === 'viewed') {
169	        // Viewed = documentStatus is 'viewed' OR (has viewedAt but not downloaded)
170	        statusConditions.push(
171	          { documentStatus: 'viewed' },
172	          sequelize.literal(`("Invoice"."viewedAt" IS NOT NULL AND "Invoice"."downloadedAt" IS NULL)`)
173	        );
174	      } else if (status === 'downloaded') {
175	        // Downloaded = documentStatus is 'downloaded' OR has downloadedAt
176	        statusConditions.push(
177	          { documentStatus: 'downloaded' },
178	          sequelize.literal(`"Invoice"."downloadedAt" IS NOT NULL`)
179	        );
180	      } else if (status === 'queried') {
181	        statusConditions.push({ documentStatus: 'queried' });
182	      } else if (status === 'review') {
183	        statusConditions.push({ documentStatus: 'review' });
184	      } else {
185	        // Fallback to invoice status for backward compatibility
186	        statusConditions.push({ status: status });
187	      }
188	    }
189	    
190	    // Combine conditions with AND logic
191	    const andConditions = [];
192	    if (searchConditions.length > 0) {
193	      andConditions.push({ [Op.or]: searchConditions });
194	    }
195	    if (statusConditions.length > 0) {
196	      if (statusConditions.length === 1) {
197	        andConditions.push(statusConditions[0]);
198	      } else {
199	        andConditions.push({ [Op.or]: statusConditions });
200	      }
201	    }
202	    
203	    if (andConditions.length > 0) {
204	      whereConditions[Op.and] = [
205	        ...(whereConditions[Op.and] || []),
206	        ...andConditions
207	      ];
208	    }
209	    
210	    // Build order clause
211	    let orderClause = [];
212	    const validSortFields = ['issueDate', 'createdAt', 'invoiceNumber', 'amount', 'status', 'retentionExpiryDate'];
213	    const sortField = validSortFields.includes(sortBy) ? sortBy : 'issueDate';
214	    const sortDir = sortOrder.toUpperCase() === 'ASC' ? 'ASC' : 'DESC';
215	    
216	    if (retentionFilter === 'expiring_soonest') {
217	      // Sort by retention expiry date (ascending - soonest first)
218	      orderClause = [
219	        [sequelize.literal('CASE WHEN "Invoice"."retentionExpiryDate" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END'), 'ASC'],
220	        ['retentionExpiryDate', 'ASC'],
221	        ['issueDate', 'DESC']
222	      ];
223	    } else {
224	      orderClause = [[sortField, sortDir], ['createdAt', 'DESC']];
225	    }
226	    
227	    const { count, rows } = await Invoice.findAndCountAll({
228	      where: whereConditions,
229	      include: [{
230	        model: Company,
231	        as: 'company',
232	        attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'type', 'parentId', 'code'],
233	        required: false, // LEFT JOIN - show invoices even if company is missing/deleted
234	        include: [{
235	          model: Company,
236	          as: 'parent',
237	          attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'type', 'code'],
238	          required: false
239	        }]
240	      }],
241	      attributes: {
242	        include: ['viewedAt', 'downloadedAt', 'retentionExpiryDate', 'retentionStartDate']
243	      },
244	      limit: limitNum,
245	      offset: offset,
246	      order: orderClause,
247	      distinct: true // Important when using JOINs with search
248	    });
249	    
250	    // Fetch query information for all invoices
251	    const invoiceIds = rows.map(inv => inv.id);
252	    const queries = await DocumentQuery.findAll({
253	      where: {
254	        documentType: 'invoice',
255	        documentId: { [Op.in]: invoiceIds }
256	      },
257	      attributes: ['documentId', 'status', 'lastMessageBy', 'lastMessageAt', 'messages']
258	    });
259	    
260	    // Create a map of invoiceId -> query info
261	    const queryMap = new Map();
262	    queries.forEach(query => {
263	      queryMap.set(query.documentId, {
264	        hasQuery: true,
265	        status: query.status,
266	        lastMessageBy: query.lastMessageBy,
267	        lastMessageAt: query.lastMessageAt,
268	        messages: query.messages || []
269	      });
270	    });
271	    
272	    // Add query info to each invoice
273	    const invoicesWithQueryInfo = rows.map(invoice => {
274	      const invoiceData = invoice.toJSON();
275	      const queryInfo = queryMap.get(invoice.id);
276	      
277	      if (queryInfo) {
278	        invoiceData.queryInfo = {
279	          hasQuery: true,
280	          status: queryInfo.status,
281	          lastMessageBy: queryInfo.lastMessageBy,
282	          lastMessageAt: queryInfo.lastMessageAt,
283	          lastMessage: queryInfo.messages.length > 0 ? queryInfo.messages[queryInfo.messages.length - 1] : null
284	        };
285	      } else {
286	        invoiceData.queryInfo = {
287	          hasQuery: false,
288	          status: null,
289	          lastMessageBy: null,
290	          lastMessageAt: null,
291	          lastMessage: null
292	        };
293	      }
294	      
295	      return invoiceData;
296	    });
297	    
298	    res.json({
299	      data: invoicesWithQueryInfo,
300	      pagination: {
301	        page: pageNum,
302	        limit: limitNum,
303	        total: count,
304	        pages: Math.ceil(count / limitNum)
305	      }
306	    });
307	  } catch (error) {
308	    console.error('Error fetching invoices:', error);
309	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
310	  }
311	});
312	
313	// Diagnostic endpoint to check invoice creation (Global Admin only)
314	router.get('/diagnostics', async (req, res) => {
315	  try {
316	    if (req.user.role !== 'global_admin') {
317	      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied. Global admin only.' });
318	    }
319	
320	    const { Invoice, File, Company } = require('../models');
321	    const { Op } = Sequelize;
322	
323	    // Get total invoice count (no filters)
324	    const totalInvoices = await Invoice.count();
325	    
326	    // Get invoices with accessible company filter
327	    const whereConditions = buildCompanyFilter(req.accessibleCompanyIds);
328	    const accessibleInvoices = await Invoice.count({
329	      where: whereConditions
330	    });
331	    
332	    // Get invoices without company filter (raw count)
333	    const allInvoicesRaw = await Invoice.count();
334	    
335	    // Check for invoices with missing companies
336	    const invoicesWithMissingCompanies = await Invoice.count({
337	      include: [{
338	        model: Company,
339	        as: 'company',
340	        required: false,
341	        where: { id: null } // This won't work, need different approach
342	      }]
343	    });
344	    
345	    // Better approach: Get all invoices and check which have companies
346	    const allInvoicesWithCompanies = await Invoice.findAll({
347	      limit: 100,
348	      include: [{
349	        model: Company,
350	        as: 'company',
351	        required: false
352	      }]
353	    });
354	    
355	    const invoicesWithoutCompany = allInvoicesWithCompanies.filter(inv => !inv.company).length;
356	
357	    // Get recent invoices (last 10) - no filters to see all
358	    const recentInvoices = await Invoice.findAll({
359	      limit: 10,
360	      order: [['createdAt', 'DESC']],
361	      include: [{
362	        model: Company,
363	        as: 'company',
364	        attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo'],
365	        required: false // LEFT JOIN - show invoices even if company is missing
366	      }]
367	    });
368	
369	    // Get files that should have created invoices
370	    // Note: File model doesn't have a direct Company association, so we fetch companies separately
371	    const matchedFiles = await File.findAll({
372	      where: {
373	        status: 'parsed',
374	        customerId: { [Op.ne]: null },
375	        parsedData: {
376	          [Op.not]: null
377	        }
378	      },
379	      limit: 10,
380	      order: [['createdAt', 'DESC']],
381	      attributes: ['id', 'fileName', 'customerId', 'status', 'parsedData', 'createdAt']
382	    });
383	    
384	    // Manually fetch companies for matched files
385	    const matchedFilesWithCompanies = await Promise.all(
386	      matchedFiles.map(async (file) => {
387	        let company = null;
388	        if (file.customerId) {
389	          company = await Company.findByPk(file.customerId, {
390	            attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo']
391	          });
392	        }
393	        return {
394	          id: file.id,
395	          fileName: file.fileName,
396	          customerId: file.customerId,
397	          companyName: company?.name || null,
398	          companyReferenceNo: company?.referenceNo || null,
399	          documentType: file.parsedData?.documentType,
400	          accountNumber: file.parsedData?.accountNumber,
401	          status: file.status
402	        };
403	      })
404	    );
405	
406	    // Check for invoices by file name (to find invoices that might exist but aren't showing)
407	    const fileNameToCheck = req.query.fileName || null;
408	    let invoicesByFileName = [];
409	    if (fileNameToCheck) {
410	      invoicesByFileName = await Invoice.findAll({
411	        where: {
412	          [Op.or]: [
413	            { 'metadata.fileName': { [Op.iLike]: `%${fileNameToCheck}%` } },
414	            { fileUrl: { [Op.iLike]: `%${fileNameToCheck}%` } }
415	          ]
416	        },
417	        include: [{
418	          model: Company,
419	          as: 'company',
420	          attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo'],
421	          required: false
422	        }],
423	        limit: 10
424	      });
425	    }
426	
427	    res.json({
428	      totalInvoices,
429	      allInvoicesRaw,
430	      accessibleInvoices,
431	      invoicesWithoutCompany,
432	      whereConditions,
433	      accessibleCompanyIds: req.accessibleCompanyIds,
434	      userRole: req.user.role,
435	      recentInvoices: recentInvoices.map(inv => ({
436	        id: inv.id,
437	        invoiceNumber: inv.invoiceNumber,
438	        companyId: inv.companyId,
439	        companyName: inv.company?.name || 'NO COMPANY',
440	        companyReferenceNo: inv.company?.referenceNo || 'N/A',
441	        createdAt: inv.createdAt,
442	        status: inv.status,
443	        documentStatus: inv.documentStatus
444	      })),
445	      matchedFiles: matchedFilesWithCompanies,
446	      invoicesByFileName: invoicesByFileName.map(inv => ({
447	        id: inv.id,
448	        invoiceNumber: inv.invoiceNumber,
449	        companyId: inv.companyId,
450	        companyName: inv.company?.name || 'NO COMPANY',
451	        companyReferenceNo: inv.company?.referenceNo || 'N/A',
452	        fileUrl: inv.fileUrl,
453	        metadata: inv.metadata
454	      }))
455	    });
456	  } catch (error) {
457	    console.error('Error in diagnostics:', error);
458	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
459	  }
460	});
461	
462	// Get single invoice (marks as viewed if not already)
463	router.get('/:id', async (req, res) => {
464	  try {
465	    const invoice = await Invoice.findByPk(req.params.id, {
466	      include: [{
467	        model: Company,
468	        as: 'company',
469	        attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'type', 'globalSystemEmail', 'parentId', 'code'],
470	        required: false, // LEFT JOIN - show invoice even if company is missing/deleted
471	        include: [{
472	          model: Company,
473	          as: 'parent',
474	          attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'type', 'code'],
475	          required: false
476	        }]
477	      }]
478	    });
479	    
480	    if (!invoice) {
481	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });
482	    }
483	    
484	    // Double-check access to this specific invoice's company
485	    if (req.accessibleCompanyIds !== null && 
486	        !req.accessibleCompanyIds.includes(invoice.companyId)) {
487	      return res.status(403).json({ 
488	        message: 'Access denied. You do not have access to this invoice.' 
489	      });
490	    }
491	    
492	    // Mark as viewed when fetching (if not already downloaded)
493	    // Only update status if setting allows all users OR user is external_user
494	    // When setting is enabled, ONLY external users can change status (no exceptions)
495	    const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
496	    const canUpdateStatus = !settings.onlyExternalUsersChangeDocumentStatus || req.user.role === 'external_user';
497	    
498	    // Skip auto-mark-as-viewed for admins/GA (they can manually set status)
499	    const isAdmin = req.user.role === 'global_admin' || req.user.role === 'administrator';
500	    const shouldAutoMarkAsViewed = canUpdateStatus && !isAdmin && invoice.documentStatus !== 'downloaded';
501	    
502	    if (shouldAutoMarkAsViewed) {
503	      const wasFirstView = !invoice.viewedAt;
504	      const now = new Date();
505	      
506	      if (!invoice.viewedAt) {
507	        invoice.viewedAt = now;
508	      }
509	      
510	      invoice.documentStatus = 'viewed';
511	      
512	      // Store who viewed in metadata
513	      const metadata = invoice.metadata || {};
514	      if (!metadata.viewedBy) {
515	        metadata.viewedBy = req.user.userId;
516	        metadata.viewedByEmail = req.user.email;
517	        metadata.viewedByName = req.user.name || req.user.email;
518	      }
519	      invoice.metadata = metadata;
520	      
521	      await invoice.save();
522	      
523	      if (wasFirstView) {
524	        console.log(`👁️  Invoice ${invoice.invoiceNumber} marked as viewed by ${req.user.email}`);
525	      }
526	    }
527	    
528	    res.json(invoice);
529	  } catch (error) {
530	    console.error('Error fetching invoice:', error);
531	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
532	  }
533	});
534	
535	// Create invoice (only for GA + Admin)
536	router.post('/', requirePermission('INVOICES_EDIT'), async (req, res) => {
537	  try {
538	    
539	    const {
540	      invoiceNumber,
541	      companyId,
542	      issueDate,
543	      dueDate,
544	      amount,
545	      taxAmount,
546	      status,
547	      items,
548	      notes,
549	      fileUrl,
550	      metadata
551	    } = req.body;
552	    
553	    // Validate required fields
554	    if (!invoiceNumber || !companyId || !issueDate || amount === undefined) {
555	      return res.status(400).json({ 
556	        message: 'invoiceNumber, companyId, issueDate, and amount are required' 
557	      });
558	    }
559	    
560	    // Check if invoice number already exists
561	    const existingInvoice = await Invoice.findOne({
562	      where: { invoiceNumber }
563	    });
564	    
565	    if (existingInvoice) {
566	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Invoice number already exists' });
567	    }
568	    
569	    // Verify company exists
570	    const company = await Company.findByPk(companyId);
571	    if (!company) {
572	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Company not found' });
573	    }
574	    
575	    // Get settings for retention calculation
576	    const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
577	    
578	    // Prepare document data for retention calculation
579	    const documentDataForRetention = {
580	      issueDate: new Date(issueDate),
581	      createdAt: new Date(),
582	      documentStatus: 'ready'
583	    };
584	    
585	    // Calculate retention dates
586	    const retentionDates = calculateDocumentRetentionDates(documentDataForRetention, settings);
587	    
588	    const invoice = await Invoice.create({
589	      invoiceNumber,
590	      companyId,
591	      issueDate,
592	      dueDate,
593	      amount,
594	      taxAmount: taxAmount || 0,
595	      status: status || 'draft',
596	      items: items || [],
597	      notes,
598	      fileUrl,
599	      metadata: metadata || {},
600	      createdById: req.user.userId,
601	      retentionStartDate: retentionDates.retentionStartDate,
602	      retentionExpiryDate: retentionDates.retentionExpiryDate
603	    });
604	    
605	    // Reload with company
606	    await invoice.reload({
607	      include: [{
608	        model: Company,
609	        as: 'company',
610	        attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'type']
611	      }]
612	    });
613	    
614	    res.status(201).json(invoice);
615	  } catch (error) {
616	    console.error('Error creating invoice:', error);
617	    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
618	  }
619	});
620	
621	// Import invoices - bulk upload (max 500 files) - GA + Admin only
622	router.post('/import', requirePermission('INVOICES_IMPORT'), importUpload.array('files', 500), async (req, res) => {
623	  try {
624	    if (!req.files || req.files.length === 0) {
625	      return res.status(400).json({
626	        success: false,
627	        message: 'No files uploaded. Please select at least one file.',
628	        error: 'No files provided'
629	      });
630	    }
631	    
632	    // Validate file types - only PDF for invoices/credit notes
633	    const invalidFiles = req.files.filter(file => {
634	      const ext = path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase();
635	      return ext !== '.pdf';
636	    });
637	    
638	    if (invalidFiles.length > 0) {
639	      // Delete invalid files
640	      invalidFiles.forEach(file => {
641	        if (fs.existsSync(file.path)) {
642	          fs.unlinkSync(file.path);
643	        }
644	      });
645	      return res.status(400).json({
646	        success: false,
647	        message: `Only PDF files are allowed for invoice/credit note imports. ${invalidFiles.length} invalid file(s) rejected.`,
648	        error: 'Invalid file type'
649	      });
650	    }
651	    
652	    // Limit to 500 files
653	    if (req.files.length > 500) {
654	      // Delete uploaded files
655	      req.files.forEach(file => {
656	        if (fs.existsSync(file.path)) {
657	          fs.unlinkSync(file.path);
658	        }
659	      });
660	      return res.status(400).json({
661	        success: false,
662	        message: 'Maximum 500 files allowed for import.',
663	        error: 'Too many files'
664	      });
665	    }
666	    
667	    const importId = uuidv4();
668	    const userId = req.user.userId;
669	    
670	    // Log file upload
671	    await logActivity({
672	      type: ActivityType.FILE_UPLOAD,
673	      userId: userId,
674	      userEmail: req.user.email,
675	      userRole: req.user.role,
676	      action: `Uploaded ${req.files.length} file(s) for import`,
677	      details: { 
678	        importId: importId,
679	        fileCount: req.files.length,
680	        fileNames: req.files.map(f => f.originalname),
681	        uploadMethod: 'manual'
682	      },
683	      companyId: null,
684	      companyName: null,
685	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
686	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
687	    });
688	    
689	    // OPTIMIZATION: Batch duplicate detection - calculate all hashes upfront and do single DB query
690	    // This is O(new_files) instead of O(new_files * existing_files)
691	    console.log(`🔍 Calculating hashes for ${req.files.length} file(s) for batch duplicate detection...`);
692	    const crypto = require('crypto');
693	    const { File } = require('../models');
694	    const fileHashMap = new Map(); // Map<filePath, { hash, fileName, originalName }>
695	    const fileHashes = [];
696	    
697	    for (const file of req.files) {
698	      const absolutePath = path.resolve(file.path);
699	      
700	      // Verify file exists
701	      if (!fs.existsSync(absolutePath)) {
702	        console.error(`⚠️  File not found after upload: ${absolutePath}`);
703	        continue; // Skip this file
704	      }
705	      
706	      try {
707	        // Calculate hash
708	        const fileBuffer = fs.readFileSync(absolutePath);
709	        const fileHash = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(fileBuffer).digest('hex');
710	        
711	        fileHashMap.set(absolutePath, {
712	          hash: fileHash,
713	          fileName: path.basename(file.path),
714	          originalName: file.originalname
715	        });
716	        fileHashes.push(fileHash);
717	      } catch (hashError) {
718	        console.error(`⚠️  Error calculating hash for ${absolutePath}:`, hashError.message);
719	        continue; // Skip this file
720	      }
721	    }
722	    
723	    // Single batch query to check for duplicates (O(1) with indexed lookup)
724	    console.log(`🔍 Checking ${fileHashes.length} hash(es) against database...`);
725	    const settings = await Settings.findOne();
726	    const retentionDays = settings?.fileRetentionDays || null;
727	    const retentionDate = retentionDays ? new Date(Date.now() - (retentionDays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)) : null;
728	    
729	    // Check for duplicates - include deleted files if within retention period
730	    const duplicateWhere = {
731	      fileHash: { [Op.in]: fileHashes }
732	    };
733	    
734	    // If retention period is set, check deleted files too (to keep hash records)
735	    if (retentionDate) {
736	      duplicateWhere[Op.or] = [
737	        { deletedAt: null }, // Non-deleted files
738	        { deletedAt: { [Op.gte]: retentionDate } } // Deleted files within retention period
739	      ];
740	    } else {
741	      // No retention period - check all files (including deleted) to keep hash records forever
742	      // This allows us to track hashes even after deletion
743	    }
744	    
745	    const existingFiles = await File.findAll({
746	      where: duplicateWhere,
747	      attributes: ['id', 'fileHash', 'fileName', 'status', 'deletedAt', 'filePath'],
748	      order: [['createdAt', 'DESC']]
749	    });
750	    
751	    // Create a Map for O(1) lookup: hash -> existing file
752	    const existingHashesMap = new Map();
753	    for (const existingFile of existingFiles) {
754	      if (!existingHashesMap.has(existingFile.fileHash)) {
755	        existingHashesMap.set(existingFile.fileHash, existingFile);
756	      }
757	    }
758	    
759	    console.log(`✅ Found ${existingHashesMap.size} existing file(s) with matching hash(es)`);
760	    
761	    // Build list of jobs to add (only files that have fileInfo and still exist) so totalFiles matches job count
762	    const jobsToAdd = [];
763	    for (const file of req.files) {
764	      const absolutePath = path.resolve(file.path);
765	      const fileInfo = fileHashMap.get(absolutePath);
766	      if (!fileInfo) {
767	        console.error(`⚠️  File info not found for: ${absolutePath}`);
768	        continue;
769	      }
770	      if (!fs.existsSync(absolutePath)) {
771	        console.error(`⚠️  File disappeared before adding to queue: ${absolutePath}`);
772	        continue;
773	      }
774	      const existingFile = existingHashesMap.get(fileInfo.hash);
775	      const isDuplicate = !!existingFile;
776	      const duplicateFileId = existingFile?.id || null;
777	      jobsToAdd.push({ absolutePath, fileInfo, isDuplicate, duplicateFileId });
778	    }
779	    
780	    const importStore = require('../utils/importStore');
781	    const { registerBatch } = require('../services/batchNotificationService');
782	    const filePaths = jobsToAdd.map(j => j.absolutePath);
783	    await importStore.createImport(importId, jobsToAdd.length, filePaths, userId);
784	    try {
785	      await registerBatch(importId, jobsToAdd.length, {
786	        userId: userId,
787	        userEmail: req.user.email,
788	        source: 'manual-upload'
789	      });
790	      console.log(`[Batch ${importId}] Registered batch with ${jobsToAdd.length} jobs for notification tracking`);
791	    } catch (batchError) {
792	      console.warn('Failed to register batch:', batchError.message);
793	    }
794	    
795	    for (const { absolutePath, fileInfo, isDuplicate, duplicateFileId } of jobsToAdd) {
796	      await invoiceImportQueue.add('invoice-import', {
797	        filePath: absolutePath,
798	        fileName: fileInfo.fileName,
799	        originalName: fileInfo.originalName,
800	        importId: importId,
801	        userId: userId,
802	        source: 'manual-upload',
803	        fileHash: fileInfo.hash,
804	        isDuplicate: isDuplicate,
805	        duplicateFileId: duplicateFileId
806	      }, {
807	        priority: 1,
808	        attempts: 3,
809	        backoff: { type: 'exponential', delay: 2000 },
810	        removeOnComplete: true,
811	        removeOnFail: false
812	      });
813	      if (isDuplicate) {
814	        console.log(`📤 Added file to import queue (DUPLICATE): ${fileInfo.originalName} -> ${absolutePath} (matches ${duplicateFileId})`);
815	      } else {
816	        console.log(`📤 Added file to import queue: ${fileInfo.originalName} -> ${absolutePath}`);
817	      }
818	    }
819	    
820	    res.json({
821	      success: true,
822	      importId: importId,
823	      totalFiles: jobsToAdd.length,
824	      message: `Import started. Processing ${jobsToAdd.length} file(s)...`
825	    });
826	  } catch (error) {
827	    console.error('Error starting invoice import:', error);
828	    
829	    // Clean up uploaded files on error
830	    if (req.files) {
831	      req.files.forEach(file => {
832	        if (fs.existsSync(file.path)) {
833	          try {
834	            fs.unlinkSync(file.path);
835	          } catch (cleanupError) {
836	            // Ignore cleanup errors
837	          }
838	        }
839	      });
840	    }
841	    
842	    res.status(500).json({
843	      success: false,
844	      message: error.message || 'Failed to start import',
845	      error: error.message
846	    });
847	  }
848	});
849	
850	// Get import status
851	router.get('/import/:importId', async (req, res) => {
852	  try {
853	    const { importId } = req.params;
854	    const importStore = require('../utils/importStore');
855	    const importSession = await importStore.getImport(importId);
856	    
857	    if (!importSession) {
858	      return res.status(404).json({
859	        success: false,
860	        message: 'Import session not found'
861	      });
862	    }
863	    
864	    res.json({
865	      success: true,
866	      import: {
867	        importId: importSession.importId,
868	        totalFiles: importSession.totalFiles,
869	        processedFiles: importSession.processedFiles || 0,
870	        downloadedFiles: importSession.downloadedFiles || 0,
871	        currentFile: importSession.currentFile || null,
872	        status: importSession.status,
873	        cancelled: importSession.cancelled || false,
874	        createdAt: importSession.createdAt,
875	        completedAt: importSession.completedAt
876	      }
877	    });
878	  } catch (error) {
879	    console.error('Error fetching import status:', error);
880	    res.status(500).json({
881	      success: false,
882	      message: error.message
883	    });
884	  }
885	});
886	
887	// Get import results
888	router.get('/import/:importId/results', async (req, res) => {
889	  try {
890	    const { importId } = req.params;
891	    const importStore = require('../utils/importStore');
892	    const importSession = await importStore.getImport(importId);
893	    
894	    if (!importSession) {
895	      return res.status(404).json({
896	        success: false,
897	        message: 'Import session not found'
898	      });
899	    }
900	    
901	    // Calculate summary statistics
902	    const successful = importSession.results.filter(r => r.success).length;
903	    const failed = importSession.results.filter(r => !r.success).length;
904	    const matched = importSession.results.filter(r => r.companyId).length;
905	    const duplicates = importSession.results.filter(r => r.isDuplicate).length;
906	    const unallocated = importSession.results.filter(r => r.success && !r.companyId && !r.isDuplicate).length;
907	    const totalProcessingTime = importSession.results.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.processingTime || 0), 0);
908	    const avgProcessingTime = importSession.results.length > 0 ? totalProcessingTime / importSession.results.length : 0;
909	    
910	    res.json({
911	      success: true,
912	      import: {
913	        importId: importSession.importId,
914	        totalFiles: importSession.totalFiles,
915	        processedFiles: importSession.processedFiles,
916	        status: importSession.status,
917	        createdAt: importSession.createdAt,
918	        completedAt: importSession.completedAt,
919	        summary: {
920	          successful,
921	          failed,
922	          matched,
923	          unallocated,
924	          duplicates,
925	          avgProcessingTime: Math.round(avgProcessingTime)
926	        },
927	        results: importSession.results
928	      }
929	    });
930	  } catch (error) {
931	    console.error('Error fetching import results:', error);
932	    res.status(500).json({
933	      success: false,
934	      message: error.message
935	    });
936	  }
937	});

939	// Update invoice - GA + Admin only
940	router.put('/:id', requirePermission('INVOICES_EDIT'), async (req, res) => {
941	  try {
942	    const invoice = await Invoice.findByPk(req.params.id);
943	    
944	    if (!invoice) {
945	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });
946	    }
947	    
948	    // Check access to this invoice's company
949	    if (req.accessibleCompanyIds !== null && 
950	        !req.accessibleCompanyIds.includes(invoice.companyId)) {
951	      return res.status(403).json({ 
952	        message: 'Access denied. You do not have access to this invoice.' 
953	      });
954	    }
955	    
956	    const {
957	      invoiceNumber,
958	      companyId,
959	      issueDate,
960	      dueDate,
961	      amount,
962	      taxAmount,
963	      status,
964	      documentStatus,
965	      items,
966	      notes,
967	      fileUrl,
968	      metadata,
969	      editReason
970	    } = req.body;
971	    
972	    // Check if invoice number is being changed and if it already exists
973	    if (invoiceNumber && invoiceNumber !== invoice.invoiceNumber) {
974	      const existingInvoice = await Invoice.findOne({
975	        where: { invoiceNumber }
976	      });
977	      
978	      if (existingInvoice) {
979	        return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Invoice number already exists' });
980	      }
981	    }
982	    
983	    // Track changes for edit history
984	    const changes = {};
985	    const oldValues = {};
986	    
987	    // Update fields and track changes
988	    if (invoiceNumber !== undefined && invoiceNumber !== invoice.invoiceNumber) {
989	      oldValues.invoiceNumber = invoice.invoiceNumber;
990	      invoice.invoiceNumber = invoiceNumber;
991	      changes.invoiceNumber = { from: oldValues.invoiceNumber, to: invoiceNumber };
992	    }
993	    if (companyId !== undefined && companyId !== invoice.companyId) {
994	      oldValues.companyId = invoice.companyId;
995	      invoice.companyId = companyId;
996	      changes.companyId = { from: oldValues.companyId, to: companyId };
997	    }
998	    if (issueDate !== undefined) {
999	      const newDate = new Date(issueDate);
1000	      const oldDate = invoice.issueDate ? new Date(invoice.issueDate) : null;
1001	      if (!oldDate || newDate.getTime() !== oldDate.getTime()) {
1002	        oldValues.issueDate = invoice.issueDate;
1003	        invoice.issueDate = issueDate;
1004	        changes.issueDate = { from: oldValues.issueDate, to: issueDate };
1005	      }
1006	    }
1007	    if (dueDate !== undefined) {
1008	      const newDate = dueDate ? new Date(dueDate) : null;
1009	      const oldDate = invoice.dueDate ? new Date(invoice.dueDate) : null;
1010	      if ((!newDate && oldDate) || (newDate && !oldDate) || (newDate && oldDate && newDate.getTime() !== oldDate.getTime())) {
1011	        oldValues.dueDate = invoice.dueDate;
1012	        invoice.dueDate = dueDate;
1013	        changes.dueDate = { from: oldValues.dueDate, to: dueDate };
1014	      }
1015	    }
1016	    if (amount !== undefined && parseFloat(amount) !== parseFloat(invoice.amount || 0)) {
1017	      oldValues.amount = invoice.amount;
1018	      invoice.amount = amount;
1019	      changes.amount = { from: oldValues.amount, to: amount };
1020	    }
1021	    if (taxAmount !== undefined && parseFloat(taxAmount) !== parseFloat(invoice.taxAmount || 0)) {
1022	      oldValues.taxAmount = invoice.taxAmount;
1023	      invoice.taxAmount = taxAmount;
1024	      changes.taxAmount = { from: oldValues.taxAmount, to: taxAmount };
1025	    }
1026	    if (status !== undefined && status !== invoice.status) {
1027	      oldValues.status = invoice.status;
1028	      invoice.status = status;
1029	      changes.status = { from: oldValues.status, to: status };
1030	    }
1031	    if (documentStatus !== undefined && documentStatus !== invoice.documentStatus) {
1032	      // Check if user can change document status
1033	      // When setting is enabled, ONLY external users can change status (no exceptions)
1034	      const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
1035	      const canChangeStatus = !settings.onlyExternalUsersChangeDocumentStatus || 
1036	                             req.user.role === 'external_user';
1037	      
1038	      if (!canChangeStatus) {
1039	        return res.status(403).json({ 
1040	          message: 'Access denied. Only external users can change document status when this restriction is enabled.' 
1041	        });
1042	      }
1043	      
1044	      oldValues.documentStatus = invoice.documentStatus;
1045	      invoice.documentStatus = documentStatus;
1046	      changes.documentStatus = { from: oldValues.documentStatus, to: documentStatus };
1047	    }
1048	    if (items !== undefined) {
1049	      invoice.items = items;
1050	      changes.items = { updated: true };
1051	    }
1052	    if (notes !== undefined && notes !== (invoice.notes || '')) {
1053	      oldValues.notes = invoice.notes;
1054	      invoice.notes = notes;
1055	      changes.notes = { from: oldValues.notes, to: notes };
1056	    }
1057	    if (fileUrl !== undefined) {
1058	      invoice.fileUrl = fileUrl;
1059	    }
1060	    if (metadata !== undefined) {
1061	      invoice.metadata = metadata;
1062	    }
1063	    
1064	    // If there are changes, require edit reason and log them
1065	    if (Object.keys(changes).length > 0) {
1066	      if (!editReason || editReason.trim().length === 0) {
1067	        return res.status(400).json({ 
1068	          message: 'Edit reason is required when making changes to an invoice.' 
1069	        });
1070	      }
1071	      
1072	      // Update edit tracking fields
1073	      invoice.editedBy = req.user.id;
1074	      invoice.editReason = editReason.trim();
1075	      
1076	      // Add to edit history
1077	      const editHistory = invoice.editHistory || [];
1078	      editHistory.push({
1079	        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
1080	        editedBy: req.user.id,
1081	        editedByName: req.user.name || req.user.email || 'Unknown',
1082	        reason: editReason.trim(),
1083	        changes: changes
1084	      });
1085	      invoice.editHistory = editHistory;
1086	      
1087	      // Log activity
1088	      const { logActivity } = require('../services/activityLogger');
1089	      await logActivity({
1090	        type: 'invoice_edited',
1091	        userId: req.user.id,
1092	        userEmail: req.user.email || 'Unknown',
1093	        userName: req.user.name || req.user.email || 'Unknown',
1094	        userRole: req.user.role,
1095	        action: 'Edited invoice',
1096	        details: {
1097	          invoiceId: invoice.id,
1098	          invoiceNumber: invoice.invoiceNumber,
1099	          changes: changes,
1100	          reason: editReason.trim()
1101	        },
1102	        companyId: invoice.companyId
1103	      });
1104	    }
1105	    
1106	    await invoice.save();
1107	    
1108	    // Reload with company
1109	    await invoice.reload({
1110	      include: [{
1111	        model: Company,
1112	        as: 'company',
1113	        attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'type']
1114	      }]
1115	    });
1116	    
1117	    res.json(invoice);
1118	  } catch (error) {
1119	    console.error('Error updating invoice:', error);
1120	    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
1121	  }
1122	});
1123	
1124	// Delete invoice - GA + Admin only
1125	router.delete('/:id', requirePermission('INVOICES_DELETE'), async (req, res) => {
1126	  try {
1127	    const { reason } = req.body;
1128	    
1129	    if (!reason || reason.trim().length === 0) {
1130	      return res.status(400).json({ 
1131	        message: 'Deletion reason is required for accountability.' 
1132	      });
1133	    }
1134	    
1135	    const invoice = await Invoice.findByPk(req.params.id);
1136	    
1137	    if (!invoice) {
1138	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });
1139	    }
1140	    
1141	    // Check access to this invoice's company
1142	    if (req.accessibleCompanyIds !== null && 
1143	        !req.accessibleCompanyIds.includes(invoice.companyId)) {
1144	      return res.status(403).json({ 
1145	        message: 'Access denied. You do not have access to this invoice.' 
1146	      });
1147	    }
1148	    
1149	    // Track deletion (soft delete with tracking)
1150	    invoice.deletedBy = req.user.userId;
1151	    invoice.deletedReason = reason.trim();
1152	    invoice.deletedAt = new Date();
1153	    await invoice.save();
1154	    
1155	    // Delete the physical file if it exists
1156	    if (invoice.fileUrl) {
1157	      const filePath = path.isAbsolute(invoice.fileUrl) 
1158	        ? invoice.fileUrl 
1159	        : path.join(__dirname, '..', invoice.fileUrl);
1160	      
1161	      if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
1162	        try {
1163	          fs.unlinkSync(filePath);
1164	          console.log(`🗑️  Deleted invoice file: ${filePath}`);
1165	        } catch (fileError) {
1166	          console.error(`⚠️  Failed to delete invoice file: ${fileError.message}`);
1167	          // Continue even if file deletion fails
1168	        }
1169	      }
1170	    }
1171	    
1172	    // Hard delete from database
1173	    await invoice.destroy({ force: true });
1174	    
1175	    // Log deletion
1176	    await logActivity({
1177	      type: ActivityType.INVOICE_DELETED,
1178	      userId: req.user.userId,
1179	      userEmail: req.user.email,
1180	      userRole: req.user.role,
1181	      action: `Deleted invoice ${invoice.invoiceNumber || invoice.id}`,
1182	      details: { 
1183	        invoiceId: invoice.id, 
1184	        invoiceNumber: invoice.invoiceNumber,
1185	        reason: reason.trim()
1186	      },
1187	      companyId: invoice.companyId,
1188	      companyName: invoice.company?.name || null,
1189	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1190	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1191	    });
1192	    
1193	    console.log(`🗑️  Invoice ${invoice.invoiceNumber} deleted by ${req.user.email} (${req.user.userId}). Reason: ${reason}`);
1194	    
1195	    res.json({ message: 'Invoice deleted successfully' });
1196	  } catch (error) {
1197	    console.error('Error deleting invoice:', error);
1198	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
1199	  }
1200	});
1201	
1202	// Mark invoice as viewed
1203	router.post('/:id/view', async (req, res) => {
1204	  try {
1205	    const invoice = await Invoice.findByPk(req.params.id, {
1206	      include: [{
1207	        model: Company,
1208	        as: 'company',
1209	        attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo'],
1210	        required: false
1211	      }]
1212	    });
1213	    
1214	    if (!invoice) {
1215	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });
1216	    }
1217	    
1218	    // Check access to this invoice's company
1219	    if (req.accessibleCompanyIds !== null && 
1220	        !req.accessibleCompanyIds.includes(invoice.companyId)) {
1221	      return res.status(403).json({ 
1222	        message: 'Access denied. You do not have access to this invoice.' 
1223	      });
1224	    }
1225	    
1226	    // Only update status if setting allows all users OR user is external_user
1227	    // When setting is enabled, ONLY external users can change status (no exceptions, not even GA)
1228	    const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
1229	    const onlyExternal = settings.onlyExternalUsersChangeDocumentStatus;
1230	    const userRole = req.user.role;
1231	    const canUpdateStatus = !onlyExternal || userRole === 'external_user';
1232	    
1233	    console.log(`📊 Document Status Check - onlyExternalUsersChangeDocumentStatus: ${onlyExternal}, userRole: ${userRole}, canUpdateStatus: ${canUpdateStatus}`);
1234	    
1235	    // Track if this is the first view (needed for logging)
1236	    const wasFirstView = !invoice.viewedAt;
1237	    
1238	    if (canUpdateStatus) {
1239	      // Always update status when viewed (unless already downloaded)
1240	      const now = new Date();
1241	      
1242	      if (!invoice.viewedAt) {
1243	        invoice.viewedAt = now;
1244	      }
1245	      
1246	      // Update documentStatus to 'viewed' if not already 'downloaded'
1247	      if (invoice.documentStatus !== 'downloaded') {
1248	        invoice.documentStatus = 'viewed';
1249	      }
1250	      
1251	      // Store who viewed in metadata
1252	      const metadata = invoice.metadata || {};
1253	      if (!metadata.viewedBy) {
1254	        metadata.viewedBy = req.user.userId;
1255	        metadata.viewedByEmail = req.user.email;
1256	        metadata.viewedByName = req.user.name || req.user.email;
1257	      }
1258	      invoice.metadata = metadata;
1259	      
1260	      await invoice.save();
1261	    }
1262	    
1263	    // Always log invoice view
1264	    await logActivity({
1265	      type: ActivityType.INVOICE_VIEWED,
1266	      userId: req.user.userId,
1267	      userEmail: req.user.email,
1268	      userRole: req.user.role,
1269	      action: `Viewed invoice ${invoice.invoiceNumber || invoice.id}${wasFirstView ? '' : ' (subsequent view)'}`,
1270	      details: { 
1271	        invoiceId: invoice.id, 
1272	        invoiceNumber: invoice.invoiceNumber,
1273	        documentStatus: invoice.documentStatus,
1274	        isFirstView: wasFirstView
1275	      },
1276	      companyId: invoice.companyId,
1277	      companyName: invoice.company?.name || null,
1278	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1279	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1280	    });
1281	    
1282	    res.json({ message: 'Invoice marked as viewed', viewedAt: invoice.viewedAt });
1283	  } catch (error) {
1284	    console.error('Error marking invoice as viewed:', error);
1285	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
1286	  }
1287	});
1288	
1289	// View invoice PDF (view only, no download)
1290	router.get('/:id/view-pdf', async (req, res) => {
1291	  try {
1292	    const invoice = await Invoice.findByPk(req.params.id, {
1293	      include: [{
1294	        model: Company,
1295	        as: 'company',
1296	        attributes: ['id', 'name']
1297	      }]
1298	    });
1299	    
1300	    if (!invoice) {
1301	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });
1302	    }
1303	    
1304	    // Check access to this invoice's company
1305	    if (req.accessibleCompanyIds !== null && 
1306	        !req.accessibleCompanyIds.includes(invoice.companyId)) {
1307	      return res.status(403).json({ 
1308	        message: 'Access denied. You do not have access to this invoice.' 
1309	      });
1310	    }
1311	    
1312	    if (!invoice.fileUrl) {
1313	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'No document file available for this invoice' });
1314	    }
1315	    
1316	    // Handle both absolute and relative paths
1317	    let filePath;
1318	    if (path.isAbsolute(invoice.fileUrl)) {
1319	      filePath = invoice.fileUrl;
1320	    } else {
1321	      filePath = path.join(__dirname, '..', invoice.fileUrl);
1322	      if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
1323	        filePath = invoice.fileUrl;
1324	      }
1325	    }
1326	    
1327	    if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
1328	      console.error(`File not found: ${filePath} (original: ${invoice.fileUrl})`);
1329	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Document file not found on server' });
1330	    }
1331	    
1332	    // Only update status if setting allows all users OR user is external_user
1333	    // When setting is enabled, ONLY external users can change status (no exceptions)
1334	    const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
1335	    const canUpdateStatus = !settings.onlyExternalUsersChangeDocumentStatus || req.user.role === 'external_user';
1336	    
1337	    // Mark as viewed if not already
1338	    const wasViewed = !!invoice.viewedAt;
1339	    if (canUpdateStatus && !invoice.viewedAt) {
1340	      invoice.viewedAt = new Date();
1341	      // Update documentStatus to 'viewed' if it's currently 'ready' or 'review'
1342	      if (invoice.documentStatus === 'ready' || invoice.documentStatus === 'review') {
1343	        invoice.documentStatus = 'viewed';
1344	      }
1345	      await invoice.save();
1346	    }
1347	    
1348	    // Log view (log ALL views, not just the first one)
1349	    await logActivity({
1350	      type: ActivityType.INVOICE_VIEWED,
1351	      userId: req.user.userId,
1352	      userEmail: req.user.email,
1353	      userRole: req.user.role,
1354	      action: `Viewed invoice PDF ${invoice.invoiceNumber || invoice.id}${wasViewed ? ' (subsequent view)' : ''}`,
1355	      details: { 
1356	        invoiceId: invoice.id, 
1357	        invoiceNumber: invoice.invoiceNumber,
1358	        documentStatus: invoice.documentStatus,
1359	        isFirstView: !wasViewed,
1360	        viewMethod: 'pdf_preview'
1361	      },
1362	      companyId: invoice.companyId,
1363	      companyName: invoice.company?.name || null,
1364	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1365	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1366	    });
1367	    
1368	    // Serve PDF with inline content-disposition (view only, no download)
1369	    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/pdf');
1370	    res.setHeader('Content-Disposition', `inline; filename="${path.basename(filePath)}"`);
1371	    res.sendFile(filePath);
1372	  } catch (error) {
1373	    console.error('Error viewing invoice PDF:', error);
1374	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
1375	  }
1376	});
1377	
1378	// Download single invoice document
1379	router.get('/:id/download', async (req, res) => {
1380	  try {
1381	    const invoice = await Invoice.findByPk(req.params.id, {
1382	      include: [{
1383	        model: Company,
1384	        as: 'company',
1385	        attributes: ['id', 'name']
1386	      }]
1387	    });
1388	    
1389	    if (!invoice) {
1390	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });
1391	    }
1392	    
1393	    // Check access to this invoice's company
1394	    if (req.accessibleCompanyIds !== null && 
1395	        !req.accessibleCompanyIds.includes(invoice.companyId)) {
1396	      return res.status(403).json({ 
1397	        message: 'Access denied. You do not have access to this invoice.' 
1398	      });
1399	    }
1400	    
1401	    if (!invoice.fileUrl) {
1402	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'No document file available for this invoice' });
1403	    }
1404	    
1405	    const filePath = path.isAbsolute(invoice.fileUrl) 
1406	      ? invoice.fileUrl 
1407	      : path.join(__dirname, '..', invoice.fileUrl);
1408	    
1409	    if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
1410	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Document file not found on server' });
1411	    }
1412	    
1413	    // Always update status when downloaded
1414	    // Only update status if setting allows all users OR user is external_user
1415	    // When setting is enabled, ONLY external users can change status (no exceptions, not even GA)
1416	    const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
1417	    const onlyExternal = settings.onlyExternalUsersChangeDocumentStatus;
1418	    const userRole = req.user.role;
1419	    const canUpdateStatus = !onlyExternal || userRole === 'external_user';
1420	    
1421	    console.log(`📊 Document Status Check (download) - onlyExternalUsersChangeDocumentStatus: ${onlyExternal}, userRole: ${userRole}, canUpdateStatus: ${canUpdateStatus}`);
1422	    
1423	    const wasFirstDownload = !invoice.downloadedAt;
1424	    const now = new Date();
1425	    
1426	    if (canUpdateStatus) {
1427	      if (!invoice.downloadedAt) {
1428	        invoice.downloadedAt = now;
1429	      }
1430	      
1431	      // Always set status to 'downloaded' when downloaded
1432	      invoice.documentStatus = 'downloaded';
1433	      
1434	      // Mark as viewed if not already
1435	      if (!invoice.viewedAt) {
1436	        invoice.viewedAt = now;
1437	      }
1438	      
1439	      // Store who downloaded in metadata
1440	      const metadata = invoice.metadata || {};
1441	      if (!metadata.downloadedBy) {
1442	        metadata.downloadedBy = req.user.userId;
1443	        metadata.downloadedByEmail = req.user.email;
1444	        metadata.downloadedByName = req.user.name || req.user.email;
1445	      }
1446	      invoice.metadata = metadata;
1447	      
1448	      await invoice.save();
1449	    }
1450	    
1451	    // Always log download
1452	    await logActivity({
1453	      type: ActivityType.INVOICE_DOWNLOADED,
1454	      userId: req.user.userId,
1455	      userEmail: req.user.email,
1456	      userRole: req.user.role,
1457	      action: `Downloaded invoice ${invoice.invoiceNumber || invoice.id}${wasFirstDownload ? '' : ' (subsequent download)'}`,
1458	      details: { 
1459	        invoiceId: invoice.id, 
1460	        invoiceNumber: invoice.invoiceNumber,
1461	        documentStatus: invoice.documentStatus,
1462	        isFirstDownload: wasFirstDownload
1463	      },
1464	      companyId: invoice.companyId,
1465	      companyName: invoice.company?.name || null,
1466	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1467	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1468	    });
1469	    
1470	    const fileName = path.basename(filePath);
1471	    res.download(filePath, fileName, (err) => {
1472	      if (err) {
1473	        console.error('Error downloading file:', err);
1474	        if (!res.headersSent) {
1475	          res.status(500).json({ message: 'Error downloading file' });
1476	        }
1477	      }
1478	    });
1479	  } catch (error) {
1480	    console.error('Error downloading invoice:', error);
1481	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
1482	  }
1483	});
1484	
1485	// Bulk download invoices
1486	router.post('/bulk-download', async (req, res) => {
1487	  try {
1488	    const { invoiceIds } = req.body;
1489	    
1490	    if (!Array.isArray(invoiceIds) || invoiceIds.length === 0) {
1491	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'No invoice IDs provided' });
1492	    }
1493	    
1494	    if (invoiceIds.length > 100) {
1495	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Maximum 100 invoices can be downloaded at once' });
1496	    }
1497	    
1498	    const invoices = await Invoice.findAll({
1499	      where: {
1500	        id: { [Op.in]: invoiceIds },
1501	        ...buildCompanyFilter(req.accessibleCompanyIds)
1502	      },
1503	      include: [{
1504	        model: Company,
1505	        as: 'company',
1506	        attributes: ['id', 'name'],
1507	        required: false // LEFT JOIN - show invoices even if company is missing
1508	      }]
1509	    });
1510	    
1511	    if (invoices.length === 0) {
1512	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'No accessible invoices found' });
1513	    }
1514	    
1515	    // Filter invoices that have files
1516	    const invoicesWithFiles = invoices.filter(inv => inv.fileUrl && fs.existsSync(
1517	      path.isAbsolute(inv.fileUrl) ? inv.fileUrl : path.join(__dirname, '..', inv.fileUrl)
1518	    ));
1519	    
1520	    if (invoicesWithFiles.length === 0) {
1521	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'No documents available for download' });
1522	    }
1523	    
1524	    // Only update status if setting allows all users OR user is external_user
1525	    // When setting is enabled, ONLY external users can change status (no exceptions)
1526	    const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
1527	    const canUpdateStatus = !settings.onlyExternalUsersChangeDocumentStatus || req.user.role === 'external_user';
1528	    
1529	    // Update download timestamps and log activity
1530	    const now = new Date();
1531	    for (const invoice of invoicesWithFiles) {
1532	      const wasFirstDownload = !invoice.downloadedAt;
1533	      
1534	      if (canUpdateStatus) {
1535	        if (!invoice.downloadedAt) {
1536	          invoice.downloadedAt = now;
1537	        }
1538	        
1539	        // Always set status to 'downloaded' when downloaded
1540	        invoice.documentStatus = 'downloaded';
1541	        
1542	        if (!invoice.viewedAt) {
1543	          invoice.viewedAt = now;
1544	        }
1545	        
1546	        // Store who downloaded in metadata
1547	        const metadata = invoice.metadata || {};
1548	        if (!metadata.downloadedBy) {
1549	          metadata.downloadedBy = req.user.userId;
1550	          metadata.downloadedByEmail = req.user.email;
1551	          metadata.downloadedByName = req.user.name || req.user.email;
1552	        }
1553	        invoice.metadata = metadata;
1554	        
1555	        await invoice.save();
1556	      }
1557	      
1558	      // Log each download (log ALL downloads, not just the first one)
1559	      await logActivity({
1560	        type: ActivityType.INVOICE_DOWNLOADED,
1561	        userId: req.user.userId,
1562	        userEmail: req.user.email,
1563	        userRole: req.user.role,
1564	        action: `Bulk downloaded invoice ${invoice.invoiceNumber || invoice.id}${wasFirstDownload ? '' : ' (subsequent download)'}`,
1565	        details: { 
1566	          invoiceId: invoice.id, 
1567	          invoiceNumber: invoice.invoiceNumber,
1568	          documentStatus: invoice.documentStatus,
1569	          isFirstDownload: wasFirstDownload,
1570	          bulkDownload: true,
1571	          totalInvoices: invoicesWithFiles.length
1572	        },
1573	        companyId: invoice.companyId,
1574	        companyName: invoice.company?.name || null,
1575	        ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1576	        userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1577	      });
1578	    }
1579	    
1580	    // If only one file, download directly
1581	    if (invoicesWithFiles.length === 1) {
1582	      const invoice = invoicesWithFiles[0];
1583	      const filePath = path.isAbsolute(invoice.fileUrl) 
1584	        ? invoice.fileUrl 
1585	        : path.join(__dirname, '..', invoice.fileUrl);
1586	      const fileName = path.basename(filePath);
1587	      return res.download(filePath, fileName);
1588	    }
1589	    
1590	    // Multiple files - create zip
1591	    const archiver = require('archiver');
1592	    const archive = archiver('zip', { zlib: { level: 9 } });
1593	    
1594	    res.attachment(`invoices-${Date.now()}.zip`);
1595	    archive.pipe(res);
1596	    
1597	    for (const invoice of invoicesWithFiles) {
1598	      const filePath = path.isAbsolute(invoice.fileUrl) 
1599	        ? invoice.fileUrl 
1600	        : path.join(__dirname, '..', invoice.fileUrl);
1601	      const fileName = `${invoice.invoiceNumber}_${path.basename(filePath)}`;
1602	      archive.file(filePath, { name: fileName });
1603	    }
1604	    
1605	    archive.finalize();
1606	  } catch (error) {
1607	    console.error('Error in bulk download:', error);
1608	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
1609	  }
1610	});
1611	
1612	// Bulk delete invoices - GA + Admin only
1613	router.post('/bulk-delete', requirePermission('INVOICES_DELETE'), async (req, res) => {
1614	  try {
1615	    const { invoiceIds, reason } = req.body;
1616	    
1617	    if (!Array.isArray(invoiceIds) || invoiceIds.length === 0) {
1618	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'No invoice IDs provided' });
1619	    }
1620	    
1621	    if (!reason || reason.trim().length === 0) {
1622	      return res.status(400).json({ 
1623	        message: 'Deletion reason is required for accountability.' 
1624	      });
1625	    }
1626	    
1627	    if (invoiceIds.length > 100) {
1628	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Maximum 100 invoices can be deleted at once' });
1629	    }
1630	    
1631	    const invoices = await Invoice.findAll({
1632	      where: {
1633	        id: { [Op.in]: invoiceIds },
1634	        ...buildCompanyFilter(req.accessibleCompanyIds)
1635	      },
1636	      include: [{
1637	        model: Company,
1638	        as: 'company',
1639	        attributes: ['id', 'name']
1640	      }]
1641	    });
1642	    
1643	    if (invoices.length === 0) {
1644	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'No accessible invoices found' });
1645	    }
1646	    
1647	    const deletionReason = reason.trim();
1648	    const deletedBy = req.user.userId;
1649	    const deletedAt = new Date();
1650	    const deletedInvoices = [];
1651	    const failedInvoices = [];
1652	    
1653	    // Process each invoice
1654	    for (const invoice of invoices) {
1655	      try {
1656	        // Track deletion (soft delete with tracking)
1657	        invoice.deletedBy = deletedBy;
1658	        invoice.deletedReason = deletionReason;
1659	        invoice.deletedAt = deletedAt;
1660	        await invoice.save();
1661	        
1662	        // Delete the physical file if it exists
1663	        if (invoice.fileUrl) {
1664	          const filePath = path.isAbsolute(invoice.fileUrl) 
1665	            ? invoice.fileUrl 
1666	            : path.join(__dirname, '..', invoice.fileUrl);
1667	          
1668	          if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
1669	            try {
1670	              fs.unlinkSync(filePath);
1671	              console.log(`🗑️  Deleted invoice file: ${filePath}`);
1672	            } catch (fileError) {
1673	              console.error(`⚠️  Failed to delete invoice file: ${fileError.message}`);
1674	              // Continue even if file deletion fails
1675	            }
1676	          }
1677	        }
1678	        
1679	        // Hard delete from database
1680	        await invoice.destroy({ force: true });
1681	        
1682	        // Log individual invoice deletion
1683	        console.log(`🗑️  Invoice ${invoice.invoiceNumber} (ID: ${invoice.id}) deleted by ${req.user.email} (${deletedBy}). Reason: ${deletionReason}`);
1684	        
1685	        // Log each deletion
1686	        await logActivity({
1687	          type: ActivityType.INVOICE_DELETED,
1688	          userId: req.user.userId,
1689	          userEmail: req.user.email,
1690	          userRole: req.user.role,
1691	          action: `Bulk deleted invoice ${invoice.invoiceNumber || invoice.id}`,
1692	          details: { 
1693	            invoiceId: invoice.id, 
1694	            invoiceNumber: invoice.invoiceNumber,
1695	            reason: deletionReason,
1696	            bulkDelete: true,
1697	            totalDeleted: deletedInvoices.length + 1
1698	          },
1699	          companyId: invoice.companyId,
1700	          companyName: invoice.company?.name || null,
1701	          ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1702	          userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1703	        });
1704	        
1705	        deletedInvoices.push({
1706	          id: invoice.id,
1707	          invoiceNumber: invoice.invoiceNumber,
1708	          companyName: invoice.company?.name || 'Unknown'
1709	        });
1710	      } catch (error) {
1711	        console.error(`❌ Error deleting invoice ${invoice.id}:`, error.message);
1712	        failedInvoices.push({
1713	          id: invoice.id,
1714	          invoiceNumber: invoice.invoiceNumber,
1715	          error: error.message
1716	        });
1717	      }
1718	    }
1719	    
1720	    // Summary log
1721	    console.log(`\n📊 Bulk Deletion Summary:`);
1722	    console.log(`   ✅ Successfully deleted: ${deletedInvoices.length} invoice(s)`);
1723	    console.log(`   ❌ Failed: ${failedInvoices.length} invoice(s)`);
1724	    console.log(`   👤 Deleted by: ${req.user.email} (${deletedBy})`);
1725	    console.log(`   📝 Reason: ${deletionReason}\n`);
1726	    
1727	    res.json({
1728	      message: `Successfully deleted ${deletedInvoices.length} of ${invoices.length} invoice(s)`,
1729	      deleted: deletedInvoices.length,
1730	      failed: failedInvoices.length,
1731	      deletedInvoices: deletedInvoices,
1732	      failedInvoices: failedInvoices
1733	    });
1734	  } catch (error) {
1735	    console.error('Error in bulk delete:', error);
1736	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
1737	  }
1738	});
1739	
1740	// Test FTP/SFTP connection and list PDF files - GA only
1741	router.post('/sftp/test-connection', requirePermission('FTP_CONFIGURE'), async (req, res) => {
1742	  try {
1743	    const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
1744	    
1745	    if (!settings.ftp || !settings.ftp.enabled) {
1746	      return res.status(400).json({ 
1747	        success: false,
1748	        message: 'FTP/SFTP is not enabled. Please enable and configure FTP/SFTP settings first.' 
1749	      });
1750	    }
1751	
1752	    // Support both FTP and SFTP based on settings
1753	    const connectionType = settings.ftp.type || 'ftp';
1754	    const connectionTypeUpper = connectionType.toUpperCase();
1755	
1756	    // Log the FTP config being used (without password) for debugging
1757	    console.log(`🔍 ${connectionTypeUpper} Test Connection - Using settings:`, {
1758	      host: settings.ftp.host,
1759	      port: settings.ftp.port,
1760	      username: settings.ftp.username,
1761	      type: connectionType,
1762	      directory: settings.ftp.directory,
1763	      passwordSet: !!settings.ftp.password
1764	    });
1765	
1766	    // Test connection
1767	    const connectionTest = await testConnection(settings.ftp);
1768	    if (!connectionTest.success) {
1769	      return res.status(400).json({
1770	        success: false,
1771	        message: connectionTest.message,
1772	        error: connectionTest.error
1773	      });
1774	    }
1775	
1776	    // List only PDF files (Excel is only for statements)
1777	    const allFiles = await listFiles(settings.ftp);
1778	    const pdfFiles = allFiles.filter(file => {
1779	      const name = file.name.toLowerCase();
1780	      return name.endsWith('.pdf');
1781	    });
1782	
1783	    // Log FTP/SFTP connection test
1784	    await logActivity({
1785	      type: ActivityType.FILE_UPLOAD_SYSTEM,
1786	      userId: req.user.userId,
1787	      userEmail: req.user.email,
1788	      userRole: req.user.role,
1789	      action: `Tested ${connectionTypeUpper} connection - found ${pdfFiles.length} PDF file(s)`,
1790	      details: { 
1791	        connectionTest: true,
1792	        connectionType: connectionType,
1793	        fileCount: pdfFiles.length,
1794	        totalFiles: allFiles.length
1795	      },
1796	      companyId: null,
1797	      companyName: null,
1798	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1799	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1800	    });
1801	
1802	    res.json({
1803	      success: true,
1804	      message: `Connection established. Found ${pdfFiles.length} PDF file(s).`,
1805	      fileCount: pdfFiles.length,
1806	      files: pdfFiles.map(file => ({
1807	        name: file.name,
1808	        size: file.size,
1809	        modified: file.modifyTime || file.date
1810	      }))
1811	    });
1812	  } catch (error) {
1813	    console.error('Error testing SFTP connection:', error);
1814	    res.status(500).json({
1815	      success: false,
1816	      message: 'Error testing SFTP connection: ' + error.message
1817	    });
1818	  }
1819	});
1820	
1821	// Import files from FTP/SFTP - GA only
1822	router.post('/sftp/import', requirePermission('FTP_CONFIGURE'), async (req, res) => {
1823	  try {
1824	    const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
1825	    
1826	    if (!settings.ftp || !settings.ftp.enabled) {
1827	      return res.status(400).json({ 
1828	        success: false,
1829	        message: 'FTP/SFTP is not enabled or configured.' 
1830	      });
1831	    }
1832	
1833	    // Support both FTP and SFTP based on settings
1834	    const connectionType = settings.ftp.type || 'ftp';
1835	    const connectionTypeUpper = connectionType.toUpperCase();
1836	
1837	    // Only PDF for invoices/credit notes - Excel is only for statements
1838	    const fileTypeFilter = 'pdf';
1839	
1840	    // Log the FTP config being used (without password) for debugging
1841	    console.log(`🔍 ${connectionTypeUpper} Import - Using settings:`, {
1842	      host: settings.ftp.host,
1843	      port: settings.ftp.port,
1844	      username: settings.ftp.username,
1845	      type: connectionType,
1846	      directory: settings.ftp.directory,
1847	      passwordSet: !!settings.ftp.password,
1848	      fileTypeFilter: fileTypeFilter
1849	    });
1850	
1851	    // Test connection first
1852	    const connectionTest = await testConnection(settings.ftp);
1853	    if (!connectionTest.success) {
1854	      return res.status(400).json({
1855	        success: false,
1856	        message: `${connectionTypeUpper} connection failed: ${connectionTest.message}`
1857	      });
1858	    }
1859	
1860	    // List PDF/Excel files
1861	    const allFiles = await listFiles(settings.ftp);
1862	    
1863	    // Filter only PDF files (Excel is only for statements)
1864	    const pdfFiles = allFiles.filter(file => {
1865	      const name = file.name.toLowerCase();
1866	      return name.endsWith('.pdf');
1867	    });
1868	
1869	    if (pdfFiles.length === 0) {
1870	      return res.status(400).json({
1871	        success: false,
1872	        message: `No PDF files found on ${connectionTypeUpper} server.`
1873	      });
1874	    }
1875	
1876	    const importId = uuidv4();
1877	    const userId = req.user.userId;
1878	
1879	    // Create import session store
1880	    const importStore = require('../utils/importStore');
1881	    importStore.createImport(importId, pdfFiles.length, [], userId);
1882	
1883	    // STEP 1: Download ALL files first (batch download)
1884	    console.log(`📥 Starting batch download of ${pdfFiles.length} file(s) from ${connectionTypeUpper}...`);
1885	    const downloadedFiles = [];
1886	    const fileQueueData = [];
1887	    
1888	    // Update import store with total files
1889	    importStore.updateImport(importId, {
1890	      totalFiles: pdfFiles.length,
1891	      downloadedFiles: 0,
1892	      status: 'downloading'
1893	    });
1894	    
1895	    // Send response immediately so frontend knows import started
1896	    // Downloads will continue in background
1897	    res.json({
1898	      success: true,
1899	      importId: importId,

1944	        // filename after processing completes.

2268	// Cancel an import session
2269	router.post('/import/:importId/cancel', async (req, res) => {
2270	  try {
2271	    const { importId } = req.params;
2272	    const importStore = require('../utils/importStore');
2273	    
2274	    const importSession = importStore.getImport(importId);
2275	    if (!importSession) {
2276	      return res.status(404).json({
2277	        success: false,
2278	        message: 'Import session not found'
2279	      });
2280	    }
2281	    
2282	    // Cancel the import
2283	    importStore.cancelImport(importId);
2284	    
2285	    // Remove all queued jobs for this import from BullMQ queue
2286	    try {
2287	      const jobs = await invoiceImportQueue.getJobs(['waiting', 'delayed', 'active', 'wait']);
2288	      let removedCount = 0;
2289	      for (const job of jobs) {
2290	        if (job.data.importId === importId) {
2291	          await job.remove();
2292	          removedCount++;
2293	          console.log(`🗑️  Removed queued job ${job.id} for cancelled import ${importId}`);
2294	        }
2295	      }
2296	      console.log(`🗑️  Removed ${removedCount} queued job(s) for cancelled import ${importId}`);
2297	    } catch (queueError) {
2298	      console.error(`⚠️  Error removing jobs from queue:`, queueError.message);
2299	    }
2300	    
2301	    // Clean up any downloaded files
2302	    const filePaths = importSession.filePaths || [];
2303	    for (const filePath of filePaths) {
2304	      try {
2305	        if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
2306	          fs.unlinkSync(filePath);
2307	          console.log(`🗑️  Cleaned up cancelled file: ${filePath}`);
2308	        }
2309	      } catch (cleanupError) {
2310	        console.error(`⚠️  Error cleaning up file ${filePath}:`, cleanupError.message);
2311	      }
2312	    }
2313	    
2314	    // Clean up any remaining temp files that might not be in filePaths
2315	    // (fallback for files that were downloaded but not yet tracked)
2316	    const tempDir = getStorageDir('temp');
2317	    if (fs.existsSync(tempDir)) {
2318	      const files = fs.readdirSync(tempDir);
2319	      const trackedPaths = new Set((importSession.filePaths || []).map(p => path.resolve(p)));
2320	      
2321	      for (const file of files) {
2322	        const filePath = path.join(tempDir, file);
2323	        const absolutePath = path.resolve(filePath);
2324	        
2325	        // Delete if:
2326	        // 1. It's already tracked in filePaths, OR
2327	        // 2. It starts with 'sftp-' and was created recently (within last 5 minutes)
2328	        //    to avoid deleting files from other concurrent imports
2329	        const isTracked = trackedPaths.has(absolutePath);
2330	        const isRecentSftpFile = file.startsWith('sftp-');
2331	        
2332	        if (isTracked) {
2333	          // Already handled above, but double-check
2334	          try {
2335	            if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
2336	              fs.unlinkSync(filePath);
2337	              console.log(`🗑️  Cleaned up cancelled temp file (tracked): ${filePath}`);
2338	            }
2339	          } catch (cleanupError) {
2340	            console.error(`⚠️  Error cleaning up tracked temp file ${file}:`, cleanupError.message);
2341	          }
2342	        } else if (isRecentSftpFile) {
2343	          // Fallback: delete recent sftp files (likely from this import)
2344	          try {
2345	            if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
2346	              const stats = fs.statSync(filePath);
2347	              const fileAge = Date.now() - stats.mtime.getTime();
2348	              // Only delete files less than 5 minutes old to avoid deleting files from other imports
2349	              if (fileAge < 5 * 60 * 1000) {
2350	                fs.unlinkSync(filePath);
2351	                console.log(`🗑️  Cleaned up cancelled temp file (fallback): ${filePath}`);
2352	              }
2353	            }
2354	          } catch (cleanupError) {
2355	            console.error(`⚠️  Error cleaning up temp file ${file}:`, cleanupError.message);
2356	          }
2357	        }
2358	      }
2359	    }
2360	    
2361	    // Get user identifier - try email first, then userId, then id, fallback to 'unknown'
2362	    const userIdentifier = req.user?.email || req.user?.userId || req.user?.id || 'unknown';
2363	    console.log(`🛑 Import ${importId} cancelled by user ${userIdentifier}`);
2364	    
2365	    res.json({
2366	      success: true,
2367	      message: 'Import cancelled successfully'
2368	    });
2369	  } catch (error) {
2370	    console.error('Error cancelling import:', error);
2371	    res.status(500).json({
2372	      success: false,
2373	      message: `Error cancelling import: ${error.message}`
2374	    });
2375	  }
2376	});
