1	const express = require('express');
2	const { File, Customer, Company, User, Invoice, CreditNote, Statement, sequelize } = require('../models');
3	const { Op } = require('sequelize');
4	const globalAdmin = require('../middleware/globalAdmin');
5	const auth = require('../middleware/auth');
6	const crypto = require('crypto');
7	const path = require('path');
8	const fs = require('fs');
9	const router = express.Router();
10	
11	/**
12	 * Get all files with filtering and pagination
13	 */
14	router.get('/', globalAdmin, async (req, res) => {
15	  try {
16	    const {
17	      page = 1,
18	      limit = 50,
19	      status,
20	      fileType,
21	      processingMethod,
22	      dateFrom,
23	      dateTo,
24	      search,
25	      customerId,
26	      assigned
27	    } = req.query;
28	
29	    const where = {
30	      deletedAt: null // Only show non-deleted files by default
31	    };
32	    const include = [];
33	
34	    // Status filter
35	    if (status && status !== 'all') {
36	      where.status = status;
37	    }
38	
39	    // File type filter
40	    if (fileType && fileType !== 'all') {
41	      where.fileType = fileType;
42	    }
43	
44	    // Processing method filter
45	    if (processingMethod && processingMethod !== 'all') {
46	      where.processingMethod = processingMethod;
47	    }
48	
49	    // Date range filter
50	    if (dateFrom || dateTo) {
51	      where.uploadedAt = {};
52	      if (dateFrom) {
53	        where.uploadedAt[Op.gte] = new Date(dateFrom);
54	      }
55	      if (dateTo) {
56	        where.uploadedAt[Op.lte] = new Date(dateTo + 'T23:59:59.999Z');
57	      }
58	    }
59	
60	    // Search filter (filename, invoice number, account number)
61	    if (search) {
62	      const searchConditions = [
63	        { fileName: { [Op.iLike]: `%${search}%` } }
64	      ];
65	      
66	      // Search in JSONB parsedData field
67	      searchConditions.push(
68	        sequelize.where(
69	          sequelize.cast(sequelize.col('File.parsedData'), 'text'),
70	          { [Op.iLike]: `%${search}%` }
71	        )
72	      );
73	      
74	      where[Op.or] = searchConditions;
75	    }
76	
77	    // Customer filter
78	    if (customerId && customerId !== 'all') {
79	      where.customerId = customerId;
80	    }
81	
82	    // Assigned filter (has customerId vs null)
83	    if (assigned === 'true') {
84	      where.customerId = { [Op.ne]: null };
85	    } else if (assigned === 'false') {
86	      where.customerId = null;
87	    }
88	
89	    // Include associations
90	    include.push(
91	      {
92	        model: Customer,
93	        as: 'customer',
94	        attributes: ['id', 'name', 'accountNumber'],
95	        required: false
96	      },
97	      {
98	        model: User,
99	        as: 'uploadedBy',
100	        attributes: ['id', 'name', 'email'],
101	        required: false
102	      }
103	    );
104	
105	    // Get total count for pagination (without include for performance)
106	    const total = await File.count({ where });
107	
108	    // Get files with pagination
109	    const offset = (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit);
110	    const files = await File.findAll({
111	      where,
112	      include,
113	      order: [['uploadedAt', 'DESC']],
114	      limit: parseInt(limit),
115	      offset: offset
116	    });
117	
118	    res.json({
119	      files: files.map(file => file.toJSON()),
120	      pagination: {
121	        page: parseInt(page),
122	        limit: parseInt(limit),
123	        total,
124	        pages: Math.ceil(total / parseInt(limit))
125	      }
126	    });
127	  } catch (error) {
128	    console.error('Error fetching files:', error);
129	    res.status(500).json({
130	      success: false,
131	      message: 'Error fetching files: ' + error.message
132	    });
133	  }
134	});
135	
136	/**
137	 * Get single file with full details
138	 */
139	router.get('/:id', globalAdmin, async (req, res) => {
140	  try {
141	    const { id } = req.params;
142	
143	    // Validate UUID
144	    const uuidRegex = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i;
145	    if (!uuidRegex.test(id)) {
146	      return res.status(400).json({
147	        success: false,
148	        message: 'Invalid file ID format'
149	      });
150	    }
151	
152	    const file = await File.findByPk(id, {
153	      include: [
154	        {
155	          model: Customer,
156	          as: 'customer',
157	          required: false
158	        },
159	        {
160	          model: User,
161	          as: 'uploadedBy',
162	          attributes: ['id', 'name', 'email'],
163	          required: false
164	        }
165	      ]
166	    });
167	
168	    if (!file) {
169	      return res.status(404).json({
170	        success: false,
171	        message: 'File not found'
172	      });
173	    }
174	
175	    res.json(file.toJSON());
176	  } catch (error) {
177	    console.error('Error fetching file:', error);
178	    res.status(500).json({
179	      success: false,
180	      message: 'Error fetching file: ' + error.message
181	    });
182	  }
183	});

185	/**
186	 * Bulk delete files
187	 */
188	router.delete('/bulk', globalAdmin, async (req, res) => {
189	  try {
190	    const { fileIds } = req.body;
191	
192	    if (!fileIds || !Array.isArray(fileIds) || fileIds.length === 0) {
193	      return res.status(400).json({
194	        success: false,
195	        message: 'File IDs array is required'
196	      });
197	    }
198	
199	    // Validate UUIDs
200	    const uuidRegex = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i;
201	    const validIds = fileIds.filter(id => uuidRegex.test(id));
202	
203	    if (validIds.length === 0) {
204	      return res.status(400).json({
205	        success: false,
206	        message: 'No valid file IDs provided'
207	      });
208	    }
209	
210	    // Delete files (soft delete by setting deletedAt)
211	    const deletedCount = await File.update(
212	      { deletedAt: new Date() },
213	      {
214	        where: {
215	          id: { [Op.in]: validIds },
216	          deletedAt: null
217	        }
218	      }
219	    );
220	
221	    res.json({
222	      success: true,
223	      message: `Successfully deleted ${deletedCount[0]} file(s)`,
224	      deletedCount: deletedCount[0]
225	    });
226	  } catch (error) {
227	    console.error('Error bulk deleting files:', error);
228	    res.status(500).json({
229	      success: false,
230	      message: 'Error deleting files: ' + error.message
231	    });
232	  }
233	});
234

236	 * Delete single file

238	router.delete('/:id', globalAdmin, async (req, res) => {

241	
242	    // Validate UUID

244	    if (!uuidRegex.test(id)) {
245	      return res.status(400).json({

313	/**
314	 * Get statistics for parsing log
315	 */
316	router.get('/stats/summary', globalAdmin, async (req, res) => {
317	  try {
318	    const [stats] = await sequelize.query(`
319	      SELECT 
320	        COUNT(*)::int as total,
321	        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'parsed')::int as parsed,
322	        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed')::int as failed,
323	        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'processing')::int as processing,
324	        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'pending')::int as pending,
325	        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'duplicate')::int as duplicate,
326	        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "processingMethod" = 'vision')::int as vision,
327	        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "processingMethod" = 'documentai')::int as documentai,
328	        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "customerId" IS NOT NULL)::int as assigned
329	      FROM files
330	      WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL
331	    `);
332	
333	    res.json({
334	      success: true,
335	      stats: stats[0] || {}
336	    });
337	  } catch (error) {
338	    console.error('Error fetching stats:', error);
339	    res.status(500).json({
340	      success: false,
341	      message: 'Error fetching stats: ' + error.message
342	    });

346	/**
347	 * Test Import - Create a file with mock parsed data to test import logic
348	 * This bypasses FTP and parsing, allowing you to test the matching and document creation logic
349	 * 
350	 * Example request body:
351	 * {
352	 *   "fileName": "test-invoice-123.pdf",
353	 *   "fileType": "invoice",
354	 *   "accountNumber": "12345",  // Will try to match to company
355	 *   "invoiceNumber": "INV-001",
356	 *   "amount": 1500.00,
357	 *   "date": "2025-12-09"
358	 * }
359	 */
360	router.post('/test-import', auth, globalAdmin, async (req, res) => {
361	  try {
362	    const rawFileName = req.body.fileName;
363	    const sanitizedFileName = rawFileName ? path.basename(rawFileName) : null;
364	    if (sanitizedFileName && !/^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$/.test(sanitizedFileName)) {
365	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Invalid fileName: only alphanumeric characters, dots, hyphens, and underscores are allowed' });
366	    }
367	    const fileName = sanitizedFileName || `test-invoice-${Date.now()}.pdf`;
368	    const {
369	      fileType = 'invoice', // 'invoice', 'credit_note', 'statement'
370	      parsedData = {},
371	      accountNumber = null, // Will try to match to company
372	      invoiceNumber = null,
373	      amount = null,
374	      date = null,
375	      companyId = null // Optional: directly assign to a company
376	    } = req.body;
377	
378	    // Build parsed data from provided fields or use provided parsedData
379	    const mockParsedData = {
380	      invoiceNumber: invoiceNumber || parsedData.invoiceNumber || `INV-${Date.now()}`,
381	      accountNumber: accountNumber || parsedData.accountNumber || null,
382	      amount: amount !== null ? parseFloat(amount) : (parsedData.amount || 100.00),
383	      date: date ? new Date(date).toISOString() : (parsedData.date || new Date().toISOString()),
384	      documentType: fileType,
385	      ...parsedData // Allow overriding with full parsedData object
386	    };
387	
388	    // Create a dummy file path (file doesn't need to exist for testing)
389	    const { ensureStorageDirs, getStorageDir, getFilePath } = require('../config/storage');
390	    ensureStorageDirs();
391	    const dummyFilePath = getFilePath('invoices', fileName);
392	
393	    // Create a dummy file (empty file for testing)
394	    if (!fs.existsSync(dummyFilePath)) {
395	      fs.writeFileSync(dummyFilePath, Buffer.from('TEST FILE - Created for import testing'));
396	    }
397	
398	    const fileStats = fs.statSync(dummyFilePath);
399	    const fileHash = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(dummyFilePath)).digest('hex');
400	
401	    // Try to match company by account number if provided
402	    let matchedCompanyId = companyId;
403	    if (!matchedCompanyId && mockParsedData.accountNumber) {
404	      const company = await Company.findOne({
405	        where: {
406	          referenceNo: mockParsedData.accountNumber.toString()
407	        }
408	      });
409	      
410	      if (company) {
411	        matchedCompanyId = company.id;
412	        console.log(`✅ Matched company: ${company.name} (${company.referenceNo})`);
413	      } else {
414	        console.log(`⚠️  No company found with account number: ${mockParsedData.accountNumber}`);
415	      }
416	    }
417	
418	    // Determine status based on whether company was matched
419	    let status = 'parsed';
420	    let failureReason = null;
421	    
422	    if (!matchedCompanyId && mockParsedData.accountNumber) {
423	      status = 'unallocated';
424	      failureReason = 'unallocated';
425	    } else if (!matchedCompanyId && !mockParsedData.accountNumber) {
426	      status = 'unallocated';
427	      failureReason = 'unallocated';
428	    }
429	
430	    // Create file record (File model uses customerId, but we'll store Company ID there)
431	    const file = await File.create({
432	      fileName,
433	      fileHash,
434	      filePath: dummyFilePath,
435	      fileSize: fileStats.size,
436	      fileType: fileType,
437	      status: status,
438	      failureReason: failureReason,
439	      parsedData: mockParsedData,
440	      processingMethod: 'manual', // Using 'manual' since 'test' is not in the enum
441	      customerId: matchedCompanyId, // File model uses customerId field (legacy, but works with Company)
442	      uploadedById: req.user.userId,
443	      metadata: {
444	        isTestImport: true,
445	        testData: {
446	          accountNumber: mockParsedData.accountNumber,
447	          invoiceNumber: mockParsedData.invoiceNumber,
448	          amount: mockParsedData.amount,
449	          date: mockParsedData.date
450	        }
451	      }
452	    });
453	
454	    // If company was matched, try to create the appropriate document
455	    let document = null;
456	    if (matchedCompanyId && status === 'parsed') {
457	      try {
458	        const issueDate = new Date(mockParsedData.date);
459	        
460	        if (fileType === 'invoice') {
461	          document = await Invoice.create({
462	            companyId: matchedCompanyId,
463	            invoiceNumber: mockParsedData.invoiceNumber,
464	            issueDate: issueDate,
465	            amount: mockParsedData.amount || 0,
466	            status: 'draft', // Valid status: 'draft', 'sent', 'paid', 'overdue', 'cancelled'
467	            metadata: {
468	              source: 'test_import',
469	              fileId: file.id,
470	              parsedData: mockParsedData
471	            }
472	          });
473	        } else if (fileType === 'credit_note') {
474	          document = await CreditNote.create({
475	            companyId: matchedCompanyId,
476	            creditNoteNumber: mockParsedData.invoiceNumber || mockParsedData.creditNumber || `CN-${Date.now()}`,
477	            issueDate: issueDate,
478	            amount: mockParsedData.amount || 0,
479	            status: 'draft', // Valid status: 'draft', 'sent', 'applied', 'cancelled'
480	            metadata: {
481	              source: 'test_import',
482	              fileId: file.id,
483	              parsedData: mockParsedData
484	            }
485	          });
486	        } else if (fileType === 'statement') {
487	          // Statement requires periodStart, periodEnd, openingBalance, closingBalance, etc.
488	          const periodStart = issueDate;
489	          const periodEnd = new Date(issueDate);
490	          periodEnd.setMonth(periodEnd.getMonth() + 1); // Default to 1 month period
491	          
492	          document = await Statement.create({
493	            companyId: matchedCompanyId,
494	            statementNumber: mockParsedData.invoiceNumber || mockParsedData.statementNumber || `STMT-${Date.now()}`,
495	            periodStart: periodStart,
496	            periodEnd: periodEnd,
497	            openingBalance: 0,
498	            closingBalance: mockParsedData.amount || 0,
499	            totalDebits: mockParsedData.amount || 0,
500	            totalCredits: 0,
501	            status: 'draft', // Valid status: 'draft', 'sent', 'acknowledged', 'disputed'
502	            metadata: {
503	              source: 'test_import',
504	              fileId: file.id,
505	              parsedData: mockParsedData
506	            }
507	          });
508	        }
509	        
510	        if (document) {
511	          console.log(`✅ Created ${fileType}: ${document.id}`);
512	        }
513	      } catch (docError) {
514	        console.error(`⚠️  Failed to create ${fileType} document:`, docError.message);
515	        console.error(`   Error details:`, docError.errors || docError);
516	        // Don't fail the import if document creation fails
517	      }
518	    }
519	
520	    res.json({
521	      success: true,
522	      message: `Test import completed: ${status === 'parsed' ? 'Successfully matched and processed' : 'Unallocated - no matching company found'}`,
523	      file: {
524	        id: file.id,
525	        fileName: file.fileName,
526	        status: file.status,
527	        failureReason: file.failureReason
528	      },
529	      company: matchedCompanyId ? {
530	        id: matchedCompanyId,
531	        matched: true
532	      } : {
533	        matched: false,
534	        reason: mockParsedData.accountNumber ? `No company found with account number: ${mockParsedData.accountNumber}` : 'No account number provided'
535	      },
536	      document: document ? {
537	        id: document.id,
538	        type: fileType
539	      } : null,
540	      parsedData: mockParsedData
541	    });
542	  } catch (error) {
543	    console.error('Test import error:', error);
544	    res.status(500).json({
545	      success: false,
546	      message: 'Error creating test import: ' + error.message
547	    });
548	  }
549	});
550	
551	module.exports = router;
552	
553
```

1	/**
2	 * Permission Definitions
3	 * 
4	 * Centralized permission system for role-based access control.
5	 * Each permission maps to an array of roles that have that permission.
6	 */
7	
8	// All available roles
9	const ALL_ROLES = ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager', 'credit_senior', 'credit_controller', 'external_user', 'notification_contact'];
10	
11	// Staff roles (internal users, not external customers)
12	const STAFF_ROLES = ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager', 'credit_senior', 'credit_controller'];
13	
14	// All roles with portal access
15	const PORTAL_ROLES = ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager', 'credit_senior', 'credit_controller', 'external_user'];
16	
17	/**
18	 * Permission Definitions
19	 * Format: PERMISSION_NAME: [roles that have this permission]
20	 */
21	const PERMISSIONS = {
22	  // =====================
23	  // SETTINGS & SYSTEM
24	  // =====================
25	  SETTINGS_VIEW: ['global_admin'],
26	  SETTINGS_EDIT: ['global_admin'],
27	  
28	  IMPORT_DATA_VIEW: ['global_admin', 'manager', 'credit_senior', 'credit_controller'],
29	  IMPORT_DATA_MANAGE: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'],
30	  
31	  TEMPLATES_VIEW: ['global_admin'],
32	  TEMPLATES_EDIT: ['global_admin'],
33	  
34	  FTP_CONFIGURE: ['global_admin'],
35	  
36	  // =====================
37	  // PROFILE
38	  // =====================
39	  PROFILE_VIEW_OWN: PORTAL_ROLES,
40	  PROFILE_EDIT_OWN: PORTAL_ROLES,
41	  
42	  // =====================
43	  // INVOICES
44	  // =====================
45	  INVOICES_VIEW: PORTAL_ROLES,
46	  INVOICES_IMPORT: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'],
47	  INVOICES_EDIT: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'],
48	  INVOICES_DELETE: ['global_admin', 'administrator'],
49	  INVOICES_DOWNLOAD: PORTAL_ROLES,
50	  
51	  // =====================
52	  // CREDIT NOTES
53	  // =====================
54	  CREDIT_NOTES_VIEW: PORTAL_ROLES,
55	  CREDIT_NOTES_IMPORT: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'],
56	  CREDIT_NOTES_EDIT: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'],
57	  CREDIT_NOTES_DELETE: ['global_admin', 'administrator'],
58	  CREDIT_NOTES_DOWNLOAD: PORTAL_ROLES,
59	  
60	  // =====================
61	  // STATEMENTS

64	  STATEMENTS_IMPORT: ['global_admin'],
65	  STATEMENTS_EDIT: ['global_admin'],
66	  STATEMENTS_DELETE: ['global_admin'],
67	  STATEMENTS_DOWNLOAD: ['global_admin'],
68	  
69	  // =====================
70	  // UNALLOCATED DOCUMENTS
71	  // =====================
72	  UNALLOCATED_VIEW: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager', 'credit_senior', 'credit_controller'],
73	  UNALLOCATED_EDIT: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'],
74	  UNALLOCATED_DELETE: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'],
75	  UNALLOCATED_REALLOCATE: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager'],

83	  FAILED_DOWNLOAD: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager', 'credit_senior', 'credit_controller'],
84	  FAILED_REQUEUE: ['global_admin', 'administrator', 'manager', 'credit_senior'],
85	  
86	  // =====================

131	
132	/**
133	 * Check if a role has a specific permission
134	 * @param {string} role - User's role
135	 * @param {string} permission - Permission to check
136	 * @returns {boolean}
137	 */
138	function hasPermission(role, permission) {
139	  const allowedRoles = PERMISSIONS[permission];
140	  if (!allowedRoles) {
141	    console.warn(`Unknown permission: ${permission}`);
142	    return false;
143	  }
144	  return allowedRoles.includes(role);
145	}
146	
147	/**
148	 * Check if a role has any of the specified permissions
149	 * @param {string} role - User's role
150	 * @param {string[]} permissions - Array of permissions to check
151	 * @returns {boolean}
152	 */
153	function hasAnyPermission(role, permissions) {
154	  return permissions.some(permission => hasPermission(role, permission));
155	}
156	
157	/**
158	 * Check if a role has all of the specified permissions
159	 * @param {string} role - User's role
160	 * @param {string[]} permissions - Array of permissions to check
161	 * @returns {boolean}
162	 */
163	function hasAllPermissions(role, permissions) {
164	  return permissions.every(permission => hasPermission(role, permission));
165	}
166	
167	/**
168	 * Get all permissions for a role
169	 * @param {string} role - User's role
170	 * @returns {string[]} Array of permission names
171	 */
172	function getPermissionsForRole(role) {
173	  return Object.entries(PERMISSIONS)
174	    .filter(([_, roles]) => roles.includes(role))
175	    .map(([permission]) => permission);
176	}
177	
178	/**
179	 * Check if role is internal staff
180	 * @param {string} role
181	 * @returns {boolean}
182	 */
183	function isStaffRole(role) {
184	  return STAFF_ROLES.includes(role);
185	}
186	
187	/**
188	 * Check if role has portal access
189	 * @param {string} role
190	 * @returns {boolean}
191	 */
192	function hasPortalAccess(role) {
193	  return PORTAL_ROLES.includes(role);
194	}
195	
196	module.exports = {
197	  PERMISSIONS,
198	  ALL_ROLES,
199	  STAFF_ROLES,
200	  PORTAL_ROLES,
201	  hasPermission,
202	  hasAnyPermission,
203	  hasAllPermissions,
204	  getPermissionsForRole,
205	  isStaffRole,
206	  hasPortalAccess
207	};
208	
209
```

1	const express = require('express');
2	const multer = require('multer');
3	const Papa = require('papaparse');
4	const XLSX = require('xlsx');
5	const { User, Company, UserCompany, Settings, Sequelize, sequelize } = require('../models');
6	const { Op, QueryTypes } = Sequelize;
7	const { canManageUsers } = require('../middleware/roleCheck');
8	const { canManageRole, getManageableRoles, getRoleLabel, ROLE_HIERARCHY } = require('../utils/roleHierarchy');
9	const auth = require('../middleware/auth');
10	const { requirePermission, requireAdmin } = require('../middleware/permissions');
11	const { redis } = require('../config/redis');
12	const { logActivity, ActivityType } = require('../services/activityLogger');
13	const router = express.Router();

15	// Helper function to validate UUID
16	const validateUUID = (id, fieldName = 'ID') => {
17	  // Log for debugging
18	  if (id === undefined || id === null) {
19	    console.error(`[UUID Validation] ${fieldName} is ${id}`);
20	    return { valid: false, error: `Invalid ${fieldName}: value is ${id}` };
21	  }
22	  
23	  const idString = String(id).trim();
24	  
25	  if (!idString || idString === 'undefined' || idString === 'null' || idString === '') {
26	    console.error(`[UUID Validation] ${fieldName} is invalid: "${idString}"`);
27	    return { valid: false, error: `Invalid ${fieldName}: "${idString}"` };
28	  }
29	  
30	  const uuidRegex = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i;
31	  if (!uuidRegex.test(idString)) {
32	    console.error(`[UUID Validation] ${fieldName} format is invalid: "${idString}"`);
33	    return { valid: false, error: `Invalid ${fieldName} format: "${idString}"` };
34	  }
35	  
36	  return { valid: true, value: idString };
37	};
38	
39	// Get all users (users can only see users they can manage)
40	router.get('/', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
41	  try {
42	    const { page = 1, limit = 50, search = '', role: roleFilter, companyIds } = req.query;
43	    const pageNum = parseInt(page);
44	    const limitNum = parseInt(limit);
45	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * limitNum;
46	    
47	    const manageableRoles = getManageableRoles(req.user.role);
48	    
49	    // Filter by manageable roles (global admins can see all users)
50	    const where = manageableRoles.length === Object.keys(ROLE_HIERARCHY).length
51	      ? {} 
52	      : { role: { [Op.in]: manageableRoles } };
53	    
54	    // Search filter
55	    if (search) {
56	      where[Op.or] = [
57	        { name: { [Op.iLike]: `%${search}%` } },
58	        { email: { [Op.iLike]: `%${search}%` } }
59	      ];
60	    }
61	    
62	    // Role filter
63	    if (roleFilter && roleFilter !== 'all') {
64	      where.role = roleFilter;
65	    }
66	    
67	    // Company filter - if provided, find users associated with these companies
68	    let userIdsFromCompanyFilter = null;
69	    if (companyIds) {
70	      const companyIdArray = companyIds.split(',').filter(id => id);
71	      if (companyIdArray.length > 0) {
72	        const usersWithCompanies = await User.findAll({
73	          attributes: ['id'],
74	          include: [{
75	            model: Company,
76	            as: 'companies',
77	            where: { id: { [Op.in]: companyIdArray } },
78	            attributes: [],
79	            through: { attributes: [] }
80	          }]
81	        });
82	        userIdsFromCompanyFilter = usersWithCompanies.map(u => u.id);
83	        
84	        // If no users found with these companies, return empty result
85	        if (userIdsFromCompanyFilter.length === 0) {
86	          return res.json({
87	            users: [],
88	            pagination: {
89	              total: 0,
90	              page: pageNum,
91	              limit: limitNum,
92	              pages: 0
93	            }
94	          });
95	        }
96	        
97	        where.id = { [Op.in]: userIdsFromCompanyFilter };
98	      }
99	    }
100	    
101	    // Get users with company count (much faster than loading all company data)
102	    const { count, rows: users } = await User.findAndCountAll({
103	      where,
104	      attributes: { 
105	        exclude: ['password', 'twoFactorSecret', 'resetPasswordToken', 'resetPasswordExpires', 'emailChangeToken'],
106	        include: [
107	          // Add company count as a subquery
108	          [
109	            sequelize.literal(`(
110	              SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_companies 
111	              WHERE user_companies."userId" = "User"."id"
112	            )`),
113	            'companyCount'
114	          ]
115	        ]
116	      },
117	      include: [
118	        {
119	          model: User,
120	          as: 'addedByUser',
121	          attributes: ['id', 'name', 'email'],
122	          required: false
123	        }
124	        // Don't include companies here - we'll use companyCount instead
125	      ],
126	      order: [['createdAt', 'DESC']],
127	      limit: limitNum,
128	      offset: offset,
129	      distinct: true
130	    });
131	    
132	    // Transform users to include companies array with just the count for frontend compatibility
133	    const usersWithCompanyInfo = users.map(user => {
134	      const userData = user.toJSON();
135	      // Create a fake companies array with the correct length for frontend compatibility
136	      const companyCount = parseInt(userData.companyCount) || 0;
137	      userData.companies = Array(companyCount).fill({ id: null, name: '', referenceNo: '', type: '' });
138	      delete userData.companyCount;
139	      return userData;
140	    });
141	    
142	    res.json({
143	      users: usersWithCompanyInfo,
144	      pagination: {
145	        total: count,
146	        page: pageNum,
147	        limit: limitNum,
148	        pages: Math.ceil(count / limitNum)
149	      }
150	    });
151	  } catch (error) {
152	    console.error('Error fetching users:', error);
153	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
154	  }
155	});

157	// Bulk update user status (MUST come before /:id routes)
158	router.post('/bulk-status', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
159	  try {
160	    const { userIds, isActive } = req.body;
161	    
162	    if (!Array.isArray(userIds) || userIds.length === 0) {
163	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'User IDs array is required' });
164	    }
165	    
166	    if (typeof isActive !== 'boolean') {
167	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'isActive must be a boolean' });
168	    }
169	    
170	    // Validate and filter out invalid UUIDs
171	    const validUserIds = userIds.filter(id => {
172	      if (!id || id === 'undefined' || id === 'null') {
173	        return false;
174	      }
175	      // Basic UUID format validation (8-4-4-4-12 hex characters)
176	      const uuidRegex = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i;
177	      return uuidRegex.test(id);
178	    });
179	    
180	    if (validUserIds.length === 0) {
181	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'No valid user IDs provided' });
182	    }
183	    
184	    // Prevent deactivating yourself
185	    if (isActive === false && validUserIds.includes(req.user.userId)) {
186	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'You cannot deactivate your own account' });
187	    }
188	    
189	    // Get manageable roles
190	    const manageableRoles = getManageableRoles(req.user.role);
191	    
192	    // Update users (only those the current user can manage)
193	    const where = manageableRoles.length === Object.keys(ROLE_HIERARCHY).length
194	      ? { id: { [Op.in]: validUserIds } }
195	      : { id: { [Op.in]: validUserIds }, role: { [Op.in]: manageableRoles } };
196	    
197	    const [affectedCount] = await User.update({ isActive }, { where });
198	    
199	    res.json({
200	      message: `${affectedCount} user(s) ${isActive ? 'activated' : 'deactivated'} successfully`,
201	      modifiedCount: affectedCount
202	    });
203	  } catch (error) {
204	    console.error('Bulk status update error:', error);
205	    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
206	  }
207	});
208

217	    })));

223	/**
224	 * Export users to CSV or XLSX
225	 * GET /api/users/export?format=csv|xlsx
226	 * MUST be defined BEFORE /:id route to avoid "export" being treated as a UUID
227	 */
228	router.get('/export', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
229	  try {
230	    const format = (req.query.format || 'csv').toLowerCase();
231	    if (format !== 'csv' && format !== 'xlsx') {
232	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Invalid format. Use csv or xlsx' });
233	    }
234	
235	    // Get manageable roles
236	    const manageableRoles = getManageableRoles(req.user.role);
237	    
238	    // Filter by manageable roles (global admins can see all users)
239	    const where = manageableRoles.length === Object.keys(ROLE_HIERARCHY).length
240	      ? {} 
241	      : { role: { [Op.in]: manageableRoles } };
242	
243	    // Get all users with companies
244	    const users = await User.findAll({
245	      where,
246	      attributes: { exclude: ['password', 'twoFactorSecret', 'resetPasswordToken', 'resetPasswordExpires', 'emailChangeToken'] },
247	      include: [
248	        {
249	          model: Company,
250	          as: 'companies',
251	          attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo'],
252	          through: { attributes: [] },
253	          required: false
254	        }
255	      ],
256	      order: [['name', 'ASC']]
257	    });
258	
259	    // Format data for export
260	    const exportData = users.map(user => {
261	      const companyAccountNumbers = user.companies
262	        ? user.companies.map(c => c.referenceNo).filter(refNo => refNo !== null && refNo !== undefined).join(', ')
263	        : '';
264	
265	      return {
266	        id: user.id || '',
267	        name: user.name || '',
268	        email: user.email || '',
269	        role: user.role || '',
270	        active: user.isActive ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE',
271	        all_companies: user.allCompanies ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE',
272	        company_account_numbers: companyAccountNumbers,
273	        send_invoice_email: user.sendInvoiceEmail ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE',
274	        send_invoice_attachment: user.sendInvoiceAttachment ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE',
275	        send_statement_email: user.sendStatementEmail ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE',
276	        send_statement_attachment: user.sendStatementAttachment ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE',
277	        send_email_as_summary: user.sendEmailAsSummary ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE',
278	        send_import_summary_report: user.sendImportSummaryReport ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE'
279	      };
280	    });
281	
282	    if (format === 'csv') {
283	      // Generate CSV using Papa.parse
284	      const csv = Papa.unparse(exportData, {
285	        header: true,
286	        columns: ['id', 'name', 'email', 'role', 'active', 'all_companies', 'company_account_numbers', 'send_invoice_email', 'send_invoice_attachment', 'send_statement_email', 'send_statement_attachment', 'send_email_as_summary', 'send_import_summary_report']
287	      });
288	
289	      res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/csv');
290	      res.setHeader('Content-Disposition', `attachment; filename="users-export-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv"`);
291	      res.send(csv);
292	    } else {
293	      // Generate XLSX using XLSX library
294	      const worksheet = XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(exportData);
295	      const workbook = XLSX.utils.book_new();
296	      XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(workbook, worksheet, 'Users');
297	      
298	      const buffer = XLSX.write(workbook, { type: 'buffer', bookType: 'xlsx' });
299	      
300	      res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet');
301	      res.setHeader('Content-Disposition', `attachment; filename="users-export-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.xlsx"`);
302	      res.send(buffer);
303	    }
304	
305	    // Log export activity (fire-and-forget)
306	    logActivity({
307	      type: ActivityType.USERS_EXPORTED,
308	      userId: req.user.userId,
309	      userEmail: req.user.email,
310	      userRole: req.user.role,
311	      action: `Exported ${users.length} users to ${format.toUpperCase()}`,
312	      details: {
313	        format: format,
314	        userCount: users.length
315	      },
316	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
317	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
318	    }).catch(err => console.error('Error logging export activity:', err));
319	  } catch (error) {
320	    console.error('Error exporting users:', error);
321	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
322	  }
323	});

353	      return res.status(400).json({ message: validation.error });
354	    }
355	    
356	    const user = await User.findByPk(userId, {

389	// Approve pending email change (manager/credit controller)
390	router.post('/:id/approve-email-change', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
391	  try {
392	    const userId = req.params.id;
393	    const validation = validateUUID(userId, 'user ID');
394	    if (!validation.valid) {
395	      return res.status(400).json({ message: validation.error });
396	    }
397	    const user = await User.findByPk(userId);
398	    if (!user) {
399	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'User not found' });
400	    }
401	    if (!user.pendingEmail) {
402	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'No pending email change for this user' });
403	    }
404	    if (!canManageRole(req.user.role, user.role)) {
405	      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied' });
406	    }
407	    const newEmail = user.pendingEmail;
408	    const oldEmail = user.email;
409	    user.email = newEmail;
410	    user.pendingEmail = null;
411	    user.emailChangeToken = null;
412	    user.emailChangeExpires = null;
413	    await user.save();
414	
415	    const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
416	    const { isEmailEnabled } = require('../utils/emailService');
417	    if (isEmailEnabled(settings)) {
418	      try {
419	        const { sendTemplatedEmail } = require('../utils/sendTemplatedEmail');
420	        await sendTemplatedEmail(
421	          'email-change-confirmed',
422	          newEmail,
423	          {
424	            userName: user.name || newEmail,
425	            newEmail,
426	            oldEmail
427	          },
428	          settings
429	        );
430	      } catch (emailError) {
431	        console.warn('Failed to send email change confirmation:', emailError.message);
432	      }
433	    }
434	
435	    await logActivity({
436	      type: ActivityType.EMAIL_CHANGE_VALIDATED,
437	      userId: user.id,
438	      userEmail: newEmail,
439	      userRole: user.role,
440	      action: `Email change approved: ${oldEmail} → ${newEmail}`,
441	      details: {
442	        oldEmail,
443	        newEmail,
444	        approvedBy: req.user.userId,
445	        approvedByEmail: req.user.email
446	      },
447	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
448	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
449	    });
450	
451	    res.json({ message: 'Email change approved', newEmail });
452	  } catch (error) {
453	    console.error('Approve email change error:', error);
454	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
455	  }
456	});
457	
458	// Reject pending email change (manager/credit controller)
459	router.post('/:id/reject-email-change', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
460	  try {
461	    const userId = req.params.id;
462	    const validation = validateUUID(userId, 'user ID');
463	    if (!validation.valid) {
464	      return res.status(400).json({ message: validation.error });
465	    }

468	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'User not found' });
469	    }

471	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'No pending email change for this user' });
472	    }
473	    if (!canManageRole(req.user.role, user.role)) {
474	      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied' });
475	    }

503	      userId: user.id,

513	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
514	    });

516	    res.json({ message: 'Email change request rejected' });
517	  } catch (error) {
518	    console.error('Reject email change error:', error);
519	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
520	  }
521	});

523	// Create user
524	router.post('/', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
525	  try {
526	    const { name, email, password, role } = req.body;
527	    
528	    // Validate required fields
529	    if (!name || typeof name !== 'string' || name.trim() === '') {
530	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Name is required' });
531	    }
532	    
533	    // Validate name length
534	    const trimmedName = name.trim();
535	    if (trimmedName.length > 255) {
536	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Name must be 255 characters or less' });
537	    }
538	    
539	    if (!email || typeof email !== 'string' || email.trim() === '') {
540	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Email is required' });
541	    }
542	    
543	    // Validate email format and length
544	    const trimmedEmail = email.trim();
545	    const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
546	    if (!emailRegex.test(trimmedEmail)) {
547	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Invalid email format' });
548	    }
549	    if (trimmedEmail.length > 255) {
550	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Email must be 255 characters or less' });
551	    }
552	    
553	    if (!role || typeof role !== 'string') {
554	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Role is required' });
555	    }
556	    
557	    // Validate role - global admins can create any role including other global admins
558	    const manageableRoles = getManageableRoles(req.user.role);
559	    if (!manageableRoles.includes(role)) {
560	      return res.status(403).json({ 
561	        message: `You cannot create users with role: ${getRoleLabel(role)}` 
562	      });
563	    }
564	    
565	    // Validate addedById (req.user.userId should exist from auth middleware, but double-check)
566	    if (!req.user || !req.user.userId) {
567	      return res.status(401).json({ message: 'Authentication required' });
568	    }
569	    const addedByIdValidation = validateUUID(req.user.userId, 'addedById');
570	    if (!addedByIdValidation.valid) {
571	      return res.status(400).json({ message: `Invalid user ID: ${addedByIdValidation.error}` });
572	    }
573	    
574	    // Generate temporary password if not provided
575	    const { generateReadableTemporaryPassword } = require('../utils/passwordGenerator');
576	    const tempPassword = password || generateReadableTemporaryPassword();
577	    const passwordWasGenerated = !password;
578	    
579	    // Validate password strength if provided
580	    if (password) {
581	      if (password.length < 8) {
582	        return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Password must be at least 8 characters long' });
583	      }
584	      if (!/[A-Z]/.test(password)) {
585	        return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Password must contain at least one uppercase letter' });
586	      }
587	      if (!/[a-z]/.test(password)) {
588	        return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Password must contain at least one lowercase letter' });
589	      }
590	      if (!/[0-9]/.test(password)) {
591	        return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Password must contain at least one number' });
592	      }
593	    }
594	    
595	    // Extract email preferences and company assignments
596	    const {
597	      allCompanies,
598	      sendInvoiceEmail,
599	      sendInvoiceAttachment,
600	      sendStatementEmail,
601	      sendStatementAttachment,
602	      sendEmailAsSummary,
603	      sendImportSummaryReport,
604	      companyIds
605	    } = req.body;
606	    
607	    // Validate email preferences
608	    if (sendInvoiceAttachment && !sendInvoiceEmail) {
609	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Cannot send invoice attachments without enabling invoice emails' });
610	    }
611	    if (sendStatementAttachment && !sendStatementEmail) {
612	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Cannot send statement attachments without enabling statement emails' });
613	    }
614	    if (sendEmailAsSummary && !sendInvoiceEmail && !sendStatementEmail) {
615	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Cannot send summary emails without enabling at least invoice or statement emails' });
616	    }
617	    
618	    // Validate company IDs BEFORE creating user (to avoid orphaned users on validation failure)
619	    let validatedCompanies = [];
620	    if (companyIds && Array.isArray(companyIds) && companyIds.length > 0) {
621	      // Validate all company IDs are valid UUIDs
622	      const invalidCompanyIds = [];
623	      for (const companyId of companyIds) {
624	        const uuidValidation = validateUUID(companyId, 'companyId');
625	        if (!uuidValidation.valid) {
626	          invalidCompanyIds.push(companyId);
627	        }
628	      }
629	      if (invalidCompanyIds.length > 0) {
630	        return res.status(400).json({ 
631	          message: `Invalid company ID format: ${invalidCompanyIds.join(', ')}` 
632	        });
633	      }
634	      
635	      // Find companies, excluding soft-deleted ones
636	      const whereClause = { 
637	        id: { [Op.in]: companyIds }
638	      };
639	      // Check if Company model has deletedAt field (soft deletes)
640	      const companyAttributes = Company.rawAttributes;
641	      if (companyAttributes && companyAttributes.deletedAt) {
642	        whereClause.deletedAt = null;
643	      }
644	      
645	      validatedCompanies = await Company.findAll({
646	        where: whereClause
647	      });
648	      
649	      if (validatedCompanies.length !== companyIds.length) {
650	        return res.status(400).json({ 
651	          message: 'One or more company IDs are invalid or have been deleted' 
652	        });
653	      }
654	    }
655	    
656	    // External users and notification contacts must have at least one company or All Companies
657	    if ((role === 'external_user' || role === 'notification_contact') && !allCompanies && validatedCompanies.length === 0) {
658	      return res.status(400).json({
659	        message: 'Select at least one company or enable \'All Companies\'.'
660	      });
661	    }
662	    
663	    // Wrap all database operations in a transaction for atomicity
664	    const transaction = await sequelize.transaction();
665	    
666	    try {
667	      // Create user (removed duplicate email check - let database unique constraint handle it)
668	      const user = await User.create({
669	        name: trimmedName,
670	        email: trimmedEmail.toLowerCase(),
671	        password: tempPassword,
672	        role,
673	        addedById: req.user.userId,
674	        mustChangePassword: passwordWasGenerated,
675	        allCompanies: Boolean(allCompanies),
676	        sendInvoiceEmail: Boolean(sendInvoiceEmail),
677	        sendInvoiceAttachment: Boolean(sendInvoiceAttachment),
678	        sendStatementEmail: Boolean(sendStatementEmail),
679	        sendStatementAttachment: Boolean(sendStatementAttachment),
680	        sendEmailAsSummary: Boolean(sendEmailAsSummary),
681	        sendImportSummaryReport: Boolean(sendImportSummaryReport)
682	      }, { transaction });
683	      
684	      // Assign companies if provided (for ALL user roles) - already validated above
685	      if (validatedCompanies.length > 0) {
686	        await user.setCompanies(validatedCompanies, { transaction });
687	      }
688	      
689	      // Reload user with companies
690	      await user.reload({
691	        include: [{
692	          model: Company,
693	          as: 'companies',
694	          attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'type'],
695	          through: { attributes: [] }
696	        }],
697	        transaction
698	      });
699	      
700	      // Commit transaction - all database operations succeeded
701	      await transaction.commit();
702	      
703	      // Log user creation (outside transaction - uses Redis, not database)
704	      try {
705	        await logActivity({
706	          type: ActivityType.USER_CREATED,
707	          userId: req.user.userId,
708	          userEmail: req.user.email,
709	          userRole: req.user.role,
710	          action: `Created user ${user.name} (${user.email})`,
711	          details: { 
712	            createdUserId: user.id,
713	            createdUserName: user.name,
714	            createdUserEmail: user.email,
715	            createdUserRole: user.role,
716	            allCompanies: user.allCompanies,
717	            passwordWasGenerated: passwordWasGenerated
718	          },
719	          companyId: null,
720	          companyName: null,
721	          ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
722	          userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
723	        });
724	      } catch (logError) {
725	        console.error('Error logging user creation activity:', logError);
726	        // Don't fail user creation if logging fails
727	      }
728	      
729	      // Send welcome email if email provider is configured (outside transaction - email is not critical)
730	      const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
731	      const { isEmailEnabled } = require('../utils/emailService');
732	      if (isEmailEnabled(settings)) {
733	        try {
734	          const { sendTemplatedEmail } = require('../utils/sendTemplatedEmail');
735	          await sendTemplatedEmail(
736	            'welcome',
737	            user.email,
738	            {
739	              userName: user.name,
740	              userEmail: user.email,
741	              tempPassword: passwordWasGenerated ? tempPassword : null
742	            },
743	            settings,
744	            {
745	              ipAddress: req.ip,
746	              userAgent: req.get('user-agent'),
747	              userId: req.user.userId
748	            }
749	          );
750	        } catch (emailError) {
751	          console.error('Error sending welcome email:', emailError);
752	          // Don't fail user creation if email fails
753	        }
754	      }
755	      
756	      // Return user without password
757	      const userObj = user.toSafeObject ? user.toSafeObject() : user.toJSON();
758	      delete userObj.password;
759	      
760	      // Include temporary password in response if it was auto-generated (so admin can share it)
761	      const response = { ...userObj };
762	      if (passwordWasGenerated) {
763	        response.tempPassword = tempPassword;
764	        response.message = 'User created successfully. Temporary password generated. User must change password on first login.';
765	      }
766	      
767	      res.status(201).json(response);
768	    } catch (dbError) {
769	      // Rollback transaction on any error
770	      await transaction.rollback();
771	      throw dbError; // Re-throw to be handled by outer catch block
772	    }
773	  } catch (error) {
774	    console.error('Error creating user:', error);
775	    
776	    // Handle Sequelize validation errors
777	    if (error.name === 'SequelizeValidationError') {
778	      const validationErrors = error.errors.map(e => e.message).join(', ');
779	      const fieldErrors = error.errors.map(e => ({ 
780	        field: e.path || 'unknown', 
781	        message: e.message 
782	      }));
783	      return res.status(400).json({ 
784	        message: `Validation error: ${validationErrors}`,
785	        errors: fieldErrors
786	      });
787	    }
788	    
789	    // Handle unique constraint violations (duplicate email) - race condition protection
790	    if (error.name === 'SequelizeUniqueConstraintError') {
791	      if (error.errors && error.errors.some(e => e.path === 'email')) {
792	        return res.status(400).json({ 
793	          message: 'User with this email already exists',
794	          field: 'email'
795	        });
796	      }
797	      // Handle other unique constraint violations
798	      const constraintFields = error.errors.map(e => e.path).filter(Boolean);
799	      return res.status(400).json({ 
800	        message: `Duplicate value for field(s): ${constraintFields.join(', ')}`,
801	        fields: constraintFields
802	      });
803	    }
804	    
805	    // Handle foreign key constraint violations
806	    if (error.name === 'SequelizeForeignKeyConstraintError') {
807	      return res.status(400).json({ 
808	        message: 'Invalid reference: One or more related records do not exist',
809	        details: error.message
810	      });
811	    }
812	    
813	    // Handle other Sequelize errors
814	    if (error.name && error.name.startsWith('Sequelize')) {
815	      return res.status(400).json({ 
816	        message: error.message || 'Database error occurred while creating user',
817	        errorType: error.name
818	      });
819	    }
820	    
821	    // Generic error
822	    res.status(400).json({ 
823	      message: error.message || 'An error occurred while creating the user'
824	    });
825	  }
826	});
827	
828	// Unlock user account (MUST come before /:id route)
829	router.post('/:id/unlock', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
830	  try {
831	    const userId = req.params.id;
832	    
833	    // Validate userId
834	    const validation = validateUUID(userId, 'user ID');
835	    if (!validation.valid) {
836	      return res.status(400).json({ message: validation.error });
837	    }
838	    
839	    const validatedUserId = validation.value;
840	    
841	    // Validate req.user.userId exists
842	    if (!req.user || !req.user.userId) {
843	      return res.status(401).json({ message: 'Authentication required' });
844	    }
845	    
846	    const user = await User.findByPk(validatedUserId);
847	    
848	    if (!user) {
849	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'User not found' });
850	    }
851	    
852	    // Check if current user can manage this user
853	    if (!canManageRole(req.user.role, user.role)) {
854	      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied' });
855	    }
856	    
857	    // Check if account is actually locked
858	    const { checkAccountLockout, unlockAccount } = require('../utils/accountLockout');
859	    const lockoutStatus = await checkAccountLockout(user);
860	    
861	    if (!lockoutStatus.isLocked) {
862	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Account is not locked' });
863	    }
864	    
865	    // Unlock the account
866	    await unlockAccount(user, req.user.userId);
867	    
868	    // Log unlock action
869	    await logActivity({
870	      type: ActivityType.ACCOUNT_UNLOCKED,
871	      userId: req.user.userId,
872	      userEmail: req.user.email,
873	      userRole: req.user.role,
874	      action: `Unlocked account for user ${user.name} (${user.email})`,
875	      details: { 
876	        unlockedUserId: user.id,
877	        unlockedUserName: user.name,
878	        unlockedUserEmail: user.email,
879	        previousLockReason: user.lockReason,
880	        previousLockedUntil: lockoutStatus.lockedUntil ? lockoutStatus.lockedUntil.toISOString() : null
881	      },
882	      companyId: null,
883	      companyName: null,
884	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
885	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
886	    });
887	    
888	    // Reload user to get fresh data
889	    await user.reload();
890	    
891	    const userObj = user.toSafeObject ? user.toSafeObject() : user.toJSON();
892	    delete userObj.password;
893	    delete userObj.twoFactorSecret;
894	    delete userObj.resetPasswordToken;
895	    delete userObj.resetPasswordExpires;
896	    
897	    res.json({
898	      message: 'Account unlocked successfully',
899	      user: userObj
900	    });
901	  } catch (error) {
902	    console.error('Error unlocking account:', error);
903	    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message || 'An error occurred while unlocking the account' });
904	  }
905	});
906	
907	// Toggle user active status (MUST come before /:id route)
908	router.put('/:id/status', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
909	  try {
910	    const { isActive } = req.body;
911	    const userId = req.params.id;
912	    
913	    // Debug logging
914	    console.log('[Status Update] Request params:', { id: userId, isActive });
915	    console.log('[Status Update] Full request:', { 
916	      params: req.params, 
917	      body: req.body, 
918	      user: req.user ? { userId: req.user.userId, role: req.user.role } : 'no user' 
919	    });
920	    
921	    // Validate userId
922	    const validation = validateUUID(userId, 'user ID');
923	    if (!validation.valid) {
924	      console.error('[Status Update] Validation failed:', validation.error);
925	      return res.status(400).json({ message: validation.error });
926	    }
927	    
928	    const validatedUserId = validation.value;
929	    
930	    // Validate req.user.userId exists
931	    if (!req.user || !req.user.userId) {
932	      return res.status(401).json({ message: 'Authentication required' });
933	    }
934	    
935	    const user = await User.findByPk(validatedUserId);
936	    
937	    if (!user) {
938	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'User not found' });
939	    }
940	    
941	    // Check if current user can manage this user (global admins can manage all roles)
942	    if (!canManageRole(req.user.role, user.role)) {
943	      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied' });
944	    }
945	    
946	    // Prevent deactivating yourself
947	    if (user.id === req.user.userId && isActive === false) {
948	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'You cannot deactivate your own account' });
949	    }
950	    
951	    user.isActive = isActive;
952	    await user.save();
953	    
954	    // Log user status change
955	    await logActivity({
956	      type: ActivityType.USER_UPDATED,
957	      userId: req.user.userId,
958	      userEmail: req.user.email,
959	      userRole: req.user.role,
960	      action: `${isActive ? 'Activated' : 'Deactivated'} user ${user.name} (${user.email})`,
961	      details: { 
962	        updatedUserId: user.id,
963	        updatedUserName: user.name,
964	        updatedUserEmail: user.email,
965	        updatedUserRole: user.role,
966	        isActive: isActive
967	      },
968	      companyId: null,
969	      companyName: null,
970	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
971	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
972	    });
973	    
974	    const userObj = user.toSafeObject ? user.toSafeObject() : user.toJSON();
975	    delete userObj.password;
976	    delete userObj.twoFactorSecret;
977	    delete userObj.resetPasswordToken;
978	    delete userObj.resetPasswordExpires;
979	    
980	    res.json({
981	      message: `User ${isActive ? 'activated' : 'deactivated'} successfully`,
982	      user: userObj
983	    });
984	  } catch (error) {
985	    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
986	  }
987	});
988	
989	// Update user
990	router.put('/:id', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
991	  try {
992	    const userId = req.params.id;
993	    
994	    // Debug logging
995	    console.log('[Update User] Request params:', { id: userId });
996	    console.log('[Update User] Request body:', req.body);
997	    console.log('[Update User] Current user:', req.user ? { userId: req.user.userId, role: req.user.role } : 'no user');
998	    
999	    // Validate userId
1000	    const validation = validateUUID(userId, 'user ID');
1001	    if (!validation.valid) {
1002	      console.error('[Update User] Validation failed:', validation.error);
1003	      return res.status(400).json({ message: validation.error });
1004	    }
1005	    
1006	    const validatedUserId = validation.value;
1007	    
1008	    // Validate req.user.userId exists
1009	    if (!req.user || !req.user.userId) {
1010	      return res.status(401).json({ message: 'Authentication required' });
1011	    }
1012	    
1013	    const user = await User.findByPk(validatedUserId);
1014	    
1015	    if (!user) {
1016	      console.error('[Update User] User not found:', validatedUserId);
1017	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'User not found' });
1018	    }
1019	    
1020	    console.log('[Update User] Target user:', { id: user.id, name: user.name, role: user.role });
1021	    
1022	    // Check if current user can manage this user (global admins can manage all roles)
1023	    const canManage = canManageRole(req.user.role, user.role);
1024	    console.log('[Update User] Permission check:', { 
1025	      currentRole: req.user.role, 
1026	      targetRole: user.role, 
1027	      canManage 
1028	    });
1029	    
1030	    if (!canManage) {
1031	      console.error('[Update User] Access denied: Cannot manage this user');
1032	      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied' });
1033	    }
1034	    
1035	    // Check role change permission - global admins can change to any role including global_admin
1036	    if (req.body.role && req.body.role !== user.role) {
1037	      const manageableRoles = getManageableRoles(req.user.role);
1038	      if (!manageableRoles.includes(req.body.role)) {
1039	        return res.status(403).json({ 
1040	          message: `You cannot change role to: ${getRoleLabel(req.body.role)}` 
1041	        });
1042	      }
1043	    }
1044	    
1045	    // Extract email preferences and company assignments
1046	    const {
1047	      allCompanies,
1048	      sendInvoiceEmail,
1049	      sendInvoiceAttachment,
1050	      sendStatementEmail,
1051	      sendStatementAttachment,
1052	      sendEmailAsSummary,
1053	      sendImportSummaryReport,
1054	      companyIds
1055	    } = req.body;
1056	    
1057	    // Validate email preferences
1058	    if (sendInvoiceAttachment !== undefined && sendInvoiceAttachment && 
1059	        (sendInvoiceEmail === false || (sendInvoiceEmail === undefined && !user.sendInvoiceEmail))) {
1060	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Cannot send invoice attachments without enabling invoice emails' });
1061	    }
1062	    if (sendStatementAttachment !== undefined && sendStatementAttachment && 
1063	        (sendStatementEmail === false || (sendStatementEmail === undefined && !user.sendStatementEmail))) {
1064	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Cannot send statement attachments without enabling statement emails' });
1065	    }
1066	    
1067	    // Validate summary email preference
1068	    if (sendEmailAsSummary !== undefined && sendEmailAsSummary && 
1069	        ((sendInvoiceEmail === false || (sendInvoiceEmail === undefined && !user.sendInvoiceEmail)) &&
1070	         (sendStatementEmail === false || (sendStatementEmail === undefined && !user.sendStatementEmail)))) {
1071	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Cannot send summary emails without enabling at least invoice or statement emails' });
1072	    }
1073	    
1074	    // Track email change for notification
1075	    const oldEmail = user.email;
1076	    let emailChanged = false;
1077	    
1078	    // Update fields
1079	    if (req.body.name !== undefined) user.name = req.body.name;
1080	    // Only Credit Senior, Manager, Administrator, and Global Admin can change email; Credit Controller cannot
1081	    const canChangeEmail = !['credit_controller'].includes(req.user.role);
1082	    if (canChangeEmail && req.body.email !== undefined) {
1083	      const newEmail = req.body.email.trim().toLowerCase();
1084	      
1085	      // Validate email format
1086	      const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
1087	      if (!emailRegex.test(newEmail)) {
1088	        return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Invalid email format' });
1089	      }
1090	      
1091	      // Check if email is the same
1092	      if (user.email.toLowerCase() === newEmail) {
1093	        // Email unchanged, no need to update
1094	      } else {
1095	        // Check if email is already in use by another user
1096	        const existingUser = await User.findOne({ where: { email: newEmail } });
1097	        if (existingUser && existingUser.id !== user.id) {
1098	          return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Email is already in use' });
1099	        }
1100	        
1101	        user.email = newEmail;
1102	        emailChanged = true;
1103	        
1104	        // Clear any pending email change tokens
1105	        user.pendingEmail = null;
1106	        user.emailChangeToken = null;
1107	        user.emailChangeExpires = null;
1108	      }
1109	    }
1110	    if (req.body.role !== undefined) user.role = req.body.role;
1111	    if (req.body.isActive !== undefined) user.isActive = req.body.isActive;
1112	    if (allCompanies !== undefined) user.allCompanies = allCompanies;
1113	    if (sendInvoiceEmail !== undefined) user.sendInvoiceEmail = sendInvoiceEmail;
1114	    if (sendInvoiceAttachment !== undefined) user.sendInvoiceAttachment = sendInvoiceAttachment;
1115	    if (sendStatementEmail !== undefined) user.sendStatementEmail = sendStatementEmail;
1116	    if (sendStatementAttachment !== undefined) user.sendStatementAttachment = sendStatementAttachment;
1117	    if (sendEmailAsSummary !== undefined) user.sendEmailAsSummary = sendEmailAsSummary;
1118	    if (sendImportSummaryReport !== undefined) user.sendImportSummaryReport = sendImportSummaryReport;
1119	    
1120	    await user.save();
1121	    
1122	    // Send email notification if email was changed by admin
1123	    if (emailChanged) {
1124	      try {
1125	        const Settings = require('../models/Settings');
1126	        const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
1127	        
1128	        const { isEmailEnabled } = require('../utils/emailService');
1129	        if (isEmailEnabled(settings)) {
1130	          const { sendTemplatedEmail } = require('../utils/sendTemplatedEmail');
1131	          await sendTemplatedEmail(
1132	            'email-change-admin',
1133	            user.email,
1134	            {
1135	              userName: user.name || user.email,
1136	              newEmail: user.email,
1137	              oldEmail: oldEmail,
1138	              changedBy: req.user.email || 'Administrator'
1139	            },
1140	            settings
1141	          );
1142	        }
1143	      } catch (emailError) {
1144	        // Don't fail the update if email fails
1145	        console.warn('Failed to send email change notification:', emailError.message);
1146	      }
1147	      
1148	      // Log email change activity
1149	      await logActivity({
1150	        type: ActivityType.EMAIL_CHANGE_ADMIN,
1151	        userId: req.user.userId,
1152	        userEmail: req.user.email,
1153	        userRole: req.user.role,
1154	        action: `Changed email for user ${user.name} from ${oldEmail} to ${user.email}`,
1155	        details: {
1156	          targetUserId: user.id,
1157	          targetUserName: user.name,
1158	          oldEmail: oldEmail,
1159	          newEmail: user.email
1160	        },
1161	        companyId: null,
1162	        companyName: null,
1163	        ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1164	        userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1165	      });
1166	    }
1167	    
1168	    // Log user update
1169	    await logActivity({
1170	      type: ActivityType.USER_UPDATED,
1171	      userId: req.user.userId,
1172	      userEmail: req.user.email,
1173	      userRole: req.user.role,
1174	      action: `Updated user ${user.name} (${user.email})`,
1175	      details: { 
1176	        updatedUserId: user.id,
1177	        updatedUserName: user.name,
1178	        updatedUserEmail: user.email,
1179	        updatedUserRole: user.role,
1180	        changes: {
1181	          name: req.body.name !== undefined ? req.body.name : undefined,
1182	          email: req.body.email !== undefined ? req.body.email : undefined,
1183	          role: req.body.role !== undefined ? req.body.role : undefined,
1184	          allCompanies: allCompanies !== undefined ? allCompanies : undefined,
1185	          isActive: req.body.isActive !== undefined ? req.body.isActive : undefined
1186	        }
1187	      },
1188	      companyId: null,
1189	      companyName: null,
1190	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1191	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1192	    });
1193	    
1194	    // External users and notification contacts must have at least one company or All Companies
1195	    if (user.role === 'external_user' || user.role === 'notification_contact') {
1196	      const effectiveAllCompanies = user.allCompanies;
1197	      let effectiveCompanyCount = 0;
1198	      if (companyIds !== undefined) {
1199	        effectiveCompanyCount = Array.isArray(companyIds) ? companyIds.length : 0;
1200	      } else {
1201	        const currentCompanies = await user.getCompanies();
1202	        effectiveCompanyCount = currentCompanies.length;
1203	      }
1204	      if (!effectiveAllCompanies && effectiveCompanyCount === 0) {
1205	        return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Select at least one company or enable \'All Companies\'.' });
1206	      }
1207	    }
1208	    
1209	    // Update company assignments if provided (for ALL user roles)
1210	    if (companyIds !== undefined) {
1211	      if (Array.isArray(companyIds) && companyIds.length > 0) {
1212	        // Validate company IDs exist
1213	        const companies = await Company.findAll({
1214	          where: { id: { [Op.in]: companyIds } }
1215	        });
1216	        
1217	        if (companies.length !== companyIds.length) {
1218	          return res.status(400).json({ message: 'One or more company IDs are invalid' });
1219	        }
1220	        
1221	        // Update associations
1222	        await user.setCompanies(companies);
1223	      } else {
1224	        // Clear all associations
1225	        await user.setCompanies([]);
1226	      }
1227	    }
1228	    
1229	    // Reload user with companies
1230	    await user.reload({
1231	      include: [{
1232	        model: Company,
1233	        as: 'companies',
1234	        attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'type'],
1235	        through: { attributes: [] }
1236	      }]
1237	    });
1238	    
1239	    // Return user without password
1240	    const userObj = user.toSafeObject ? user.toSafeObject() : user.toJSON();
1241	    delete userObj.password;
1242	    
1243	    res.json(userObj);
1244	  } catch (error) {
1245	    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
1246	  }
1247	});

1249	// Set password (admin sets password for user)
1250	router.put('/:id/password', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
1251	  try {
1252	    const userId = req.params.id;
1253	    const validation = validateUUID(userId, 'user ID');
1254	    if (!validation.valid) {
1255	      return res.status(400).json({ message: validation.error });
1256	    }
1257	    
1258	    const { password } = req.body;
1259	    
1260	    // Password complexity validation
1261	    if (!password || password.length < 8) {
1262	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Password must be at least 8 characters' });
1263	    }
1264	    
1265	    if (!/[A-Z]/.test(password)) {
1266	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Password must contain at least one uppercase letter' });
1267	    }
1268	    
1269	    if (!/[a-z]/.test(password)) {
1270	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Password must contain at least one lowercase letter' });
1271	    }
1272	    
1273	    if (!/[0-9]/.test(password)) {
1274	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Password must contain at least one number' });
1275	    }
1276	    
1277	    if (!/[!@#$%^&*()_+\-=\[\]{};':"\\|,.<>\/?]/.test(password)) {
1278	      return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Password must contain at least one symbol (!@#$%^&*()_+-=[]{};\':"|,.<>/? etc.)' });
1279	    }
1280	    
1281	    const user = await User.findByPk(userId);
1282	    
1283	    if (!user) {
1284	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'User not found' });
1285	    }
1286	    
1287	    // Check if current user can manage this user (global admins can manage all roles)
1288	    if (!canManageRole(req.user.role, user.role)) {
1289	      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied' });
1290	    }
1291	    
1292	    user.password = password; // Will be hashed by pre-save hook
1293	    user.mustChangePassword = false; // Clear flag when admin sets password
1294	    await user.save();
1295	    
1296	    // Log password reset by admin
1297	    await logActivity({
1298	      type: ActivityType.PASSWORD_RESET_ADMIN,
1299	      userId: req.user.userId,
1300	      userEmail: req.user.email,
1301	      userRole: req.user.role,
1302	      action: `Set password for user ${user.name} (${user.email})`,
1303	      details: { 
1304	        targetUserId: user.id,
1305	        targetUserName: user.name,
1306	        targetUserEmail: user.email
1307	      },
1308	      companyId: null,
1309	      companyName: null,
1310	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1311	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1312	    });
1313	    
1314	    res.json({ message: 'Password updated successfully' });
1315	  } catch (error) {
1316	    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
1317	  }
1318	});
1319	
1320	// Reset password (generates temporary password)
1321	router.post('/:id/reset-password', canManageUsers, async (req, res) => {
1322	  try {
1323	    const userId = req.params.id;
1324	    const validation = validateUUID(userId, 'user ID');
1325	    if (!validation.valid) {
1326	      return res.status(400).json({ message: validation.error });
1327	    }
1328	    
1329	    const user = await User.findByPk(userId);
1330	    
1331	    if (!user) {
1332	      return res.status(404).json({ message: 'User not found' });
1333	    }
1334	    
1335	    // Check if current user can manage this user (global admins can manage all roles)
1336	    if (!canManageRole(req.user.role, user.role)) {
1337	      return res.status(403).json({ message: 'Access denied' });
1338	    }
1339	    
1340	    // Generate temporary password
1341	    const { generateReadableTemporaryPassword } = require('../utils/passwordGenerator');
1342	    const tempPassword = generateReadableTemporaryPassword();
1343	    user.password = tempPassword; // Will be hashed by pre-save hook
1344	    user.mustChangePassword = true; // Force password change on next login
1345	    await user.save();
1346	    
1347	    // Send email with temporary password
1348	    try {
1349	      const { sendTemplatedEmail } = require('../utils/sendTemplatedEmail');
1350	      
1351	      const settings = await Settings.getSettings();
1352	      
1353	      await sendTemplatedEmail(
1354	        'password-reset',
1355	        user.email,
1356	        {
1357	          userName: user.name,
1358	          tempPassword: tempPassword,
1359	          resetUrl: require('../utils/urlConfig').getLoginUrl(),
1360	          expiryTime: '24 hours'
1361	        },
1362	        settings,
1363	        {
1364	          ipAddress: req.ip,
1365	          userAgent: req.get('user-agent'),
1366	          userId: req.user.userId
1367	        }
1368	      );
1369	    } catch (emailError) {
1370	      console.error('Error sending password reset email:', emailError);
1371	      // Don't fail password reset if email fails, but log it
1372	    }
1373	    
1374	    // Log password reset by admin
1375	    await logActivity({
1376	      type: ActivityType.PASSWORD_RESET_ADMIN,
1377	      userId: req.user.userId,
1378	      userEmail: req.user.email,
1379	      userRole: req.user.role,
1380	      action: `Reset password for user ${user.name} (${user.email})`,
1381	      details: { 
1382	        targetUserId: user.id,
1383	        targetUserName: user.name,
1384	        targetUserEmail: user.email,
1385	        temporaryPasswordGenerated: true
1386	      },
1387	      companyId: null,
1388	      companyName: null,
1389	      ipAddress: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
1390	      userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
1391	    });
1392	    
1393	    res.json({ 
1394	      message: 'Password reset successfully. Temporary password sent to user via email.',
1395	      tempPassword: tempPassword // Return temp password so admin can share it if needed
1396	    });
1397	  } catch (error) {
1398	    res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
1399	  }
1400	});
